<!-- 
    HR Portal: Legal Case Creation Component
    Location: Embed this in the HR dashboard, staff profile page
    Purpose: Allow HR admins to quickly create legal cases for staff members
-->

<div id="legal-case-widget" style="padding: 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a1a 0%, #0f0f0f 100%); border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 8px; max-width: 500px;">
    <h3 style="font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; color: #C47D0A; margin-bottom: 15px;">
        ⚖️ Create Legal Case
    </h3>
    
    <p style="font-size: 12px; color: #999; margin-bottom: 15px;">
        Initiate a legal matter for this staff member. The case will be routed to the Legal team.
    </p>

    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;">
        <!-- Case Type Selection -->
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; color: #666; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                Case Type
            </label>
            <select id="case-type" style="width: 100%; padding: 8px; background: #0f0f0f; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 4px; color: #fff; font-size: 12px;">
                <option value="Contract Request">📄 Contract Request</option>
                <option value="Disciplinary Review">⚠️ Disciplinary Review</option>
                <option value="Legal Clearance">✓ Legal Clearance</option>
                <option value="Termination">📋 Termination</option>
                <option value="Other">📝 Other</option>
            </select>
        </div>

        <!-- Case Title -->
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; color: #666; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                Case Title
            </label>
            <input type="text" id="case-title" placeholder="e.g., Senior Developer Offer Letter" 
                   style="width: 100%; padding: 8px; background: #0f0f0f; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 4px; color: #fff; font-size: 12px; box-sizing: border-box;">
        </div>

        <!-- HR Notes -->
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; color: #666; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                HR Notes / Context
            </label>
            <textarea id="case-notes" placeholder="Any relevant context for the legal team..." rows="3"
                      style="width: 100%; padding: 8px; background: #0f0f0f; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 4px; color: #fff; font-size: 12px; box-sizing: border-box; resize: none;"></textarea>
        </div>

        <!-- Requires Signing -->
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;">
            <input type="checkbox" id="requires-signing" checked style="cursor: pointer;">
            <label for="requires-signing" style="font-size: 11px; color: #999; cursor: pointer;">
                Document requires digital signature
            </label>
        </div>

        <!-- Action Buttons -->
        <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 10px;">
            <button onclick="createLegalCase()" style="flex: 1; padding: 10px; background: #C47D0A; color: #000; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s ease;">
                ⚖️ Create Legal Case
            </button>
            <button onclick="closeLegalCaseWidget()" style="flex: 1; padding: 10px; background: #333; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s ease;">
                Cancel
            </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Status Message -->
        <div id="case-status-msg" style="display: none; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 11px; text-align: center;"></div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    const API_BASE = '/api/hr-legal';
    let currentStaffId = null;

    // Initialize widget (call this when opening the staff profile)
    window.openLegalCaseWidget = function(staffId) {
        currentStaffId = staffId;
        document.getElementById('legal-case-widget').style.display = 'block';
        document.getElementById('case-title').value = '';
        document.getElementById('case-notes').value = '';
        document.getElementById('case-type').value = 'Contract Request';
        document.getElementById('requires-signing').checked = true;
        document.getElementById('case-status-msg').style.display = 'none';
    };

    window.closeLegalCaseWidget = function() {
        document.getElementById('legal-case-widget').style.display = 'none';
    };

    window.createLegalCase = async function() {
        if (!currentStaffId) {
            showCaseStatus('No staff member selected', 'error');
            return;
        }

        const title = document.getElementById('case-title').value.trim();
        const caseType = document.getElementById('case-type').value;
        const notes = document.getElementById('case-notes').value.trim();
        const requiresSigning = document.getElementById('requires-signing').checked;

        if (!title) {
            showCaseStatus('Please enter a case title', 'error');
            return;
        }

        try {
            // Show loading state
            showCaseStatus('Creating legal case...', 'info');

            const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/staff/${currentStaffId}/create-legal-case`, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.ec_token}`,
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    title: title,
                    category: caseType,
                    hr_memo: notes,
                    requires_signing: requiresSigning
                })
            });

            if (!res.ok) {
                const error = await res.json();
                throw new Error(error.detail || 'Failed to create legal case');
            }

            const result = await res.json();
            showCaseStatus('✓ Legal case created successfully!', 'success');

            // Clear form
            document.getElementById('case-title').value = '';
            document.getElementById('case-notes').value = '';

            // Redirect to editor after short delay
            setTimeout(() => {
                window.location.href = result.editor_url;
            }, 1500);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('ERROR:', error);
            showCaseStatus(`Error: ${error.message}`, 'error');
        }
    };

    function showCaseStatus(message, type) {
        const msgEl = document.getElementById('case-status-msg');
        msgEl.textContent = message;
        msgEl.style.display = 'block';

        if (type === 'success') {
            msgEl.style.background = 'rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2)';
            msgEl.style.color = '#10b981';
            msgEl.style.border = '1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.5)';
        } else if (type === 'error') {
            msgEl.style.background = 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2)';
            msgEl.style.color = '#ef4444';
            msgEl.style.border = '1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.5)';
        } else {
            msgEl.style.background = 'rgba(196, 125, 10, 0.2)';
            msgEl.style.color = '#C47D0A';
            msgEl.style.border = '1px solid rgba(196, 125, 10, 0.5)';
        }
    }
</script>

<!-- 
    INTEGRATION INSTRUCTIONS:
    
    1. Add this widget to your HR Staff Profile page template (e.g., hr_portal.html)
    
    2. Add a button to trigger the widget:
       <button onclick="openLegalCaseWidget(staffId)">
           ⚖️ Create Legal Case
       </button>
    
    3. Ensure localStorage.ec_token is set with the user's auth token
    
    4. The widget will create a legal case and redirect to the editor with:
       - Case type pre-selected
       - Staff member linked
       - HR notes documented
    
    5. The legal team can then:
       - Select a template
       - Populate with staff data
       - Add memo notes
       - Send for signing
-->

                                <input type="file" id="sealedPdfFile" accept="application/pdf"
                                    class="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/5 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-xs text-gray-300 focus:outline-none">
                                <button id="uploadSealedBtn" onclick="uploadSealedPDF()"
                                    class="px-4 py-2 bg-brand-gold/20 hover:bg-brand-gold/40 text-brand-gold rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition whitespace-nowrap">Upload</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Step 3: Send -->
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-black/40 rounded-xl border border-white/5">
                            <div>
                                <p class="text-sm font-bold text-gray-200">3. Finalize</p>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-500">Email sealed PDF + certificate.</p>
                            </div>
                            <button id="sendSealedBtn" onclick="sendSealedPDF()" disabled
                                class="px-4 py-2 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed">Finalize
                                & Send</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Document Preview Modal -->
    <div id="documentModal"
        class="fixed inset-0 z-[250] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/95 backdrop-blur-md hidden">
        <div
            class="w-full max-w-4xl h-[92vh] bg-[#0F1115] border-brand-gold shadow-[0_0_80px_rgba(196,125,10,0.15)] rounded-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden border border-brand-gold/30 relative">
            <div class="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 bg-[#16181D] border-b border-[#2D2F36]">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-brand-gold/10 flex items-center justify-center text-brand-gold">
                        <i class="fas fa-file-lines text-sm"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <h3 id="documentModalTitle" class="font-serif text-lg text-white m-0 leading-tight">Document
                            Preview</h3>
                        <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest"
                            id="documentModalSubtitle">Official Record</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center gap-6">
                    <a id="documentModalExternal" target="_blank" href="#"
                        class="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-gray-400 hover:text-brand-gold hover:bg-brand-gold/10 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"></i> Open in New Tab
                    </a>
                    <div class="w-px h-6 bg-[#2D2F36]"></div>
                    <button onclick="closeDocumentPreview()"
                        class="text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-white/5">
                        <i class="fas fa-times text-lg"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex-1 bg-white relative">
                <div id="documentModalLoader"
                    class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-[#0F1115] z-10 transition-opacity duration-300">
                    <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
                        <div
                            class="w-10 h-10 border-2 border-brand-gold/20 border-t-brand-gold rounded-full animate-spin">
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Retrieving Document...
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <iframe id="documentModalFrame" class="w-full h-full border-none bg-white hidden"
                    src="about:blank"></iframe>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Toast Container -->
    <div id="toastContainer"></div>

    <script>
        let invoiceId = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('id');
        let isReadOnly = false;
        let currentTab = 'body';

        // RBAC Check
        function checkPermissions() {
            try {
                const token = localStorage.getItem('ec_token');
                if (!token) return;
                const payload = JSON.parse(atob(token.split('.')[1]));
                const roles = (payload.role || "").split(",").map(r => r.trim().toLowerCase());

                const isLawyerOrAdmin = roles.includes('lawyer') || roles.includes('admin');
                isReadOnly = !isLawyerOrAdmin && roles.includes('legal');

                if (isReadOnly) {
                    console.warn('RESTRICTION: User is in READ-ONLY mode.');
                    // 1. Show banner
                    document.getElementById('readOnlyBanner').classList.remove('hidden');
                    // 2. Hide restricted buttons
                    const restricted = [
                        document.getElementById('saveBtn'),
                        document.getElementById('executeBtn'),
                        document.getElementById('mob-btn-save'),
                        ...document.querySelectorAll('button[onclick*="saveChanges"]'),
                        ...document.querySelectorAll('button[onclick*="openExecutionModal"]'),
                        ...document.querySelectorAll('button[onclick*="initiateWalkIn"]')
                    ];
                    restricted.forEach(el => { if (el) el.classList.add('hidden'); });

                    // 3. Hide secondary actions in drawer
                    const drawerRestricted = [
                        document.getElementById('mob-drawer-execute'),
                        document.getElementById('mob-drawer-save')
                    ];
                    drawerRestricted.forEach(el => { if (el) el.classList.add('hidden'); });
                }
            } catch (e) { console.error('Auth check failed:', e); }
        }

        let contractBuffer = {
            html_content: '',
            cover_html: '',
            execution_html: '',
            lawfirm_name: '',
            lawfirm_address: ''
        };

        window.onload = async () => {
            checkAuth();
            checkPermissions();
            await loadContractData();
        };

        function exec(cmd, val = null) {
            document.execCommand(cmd, false, val);
            autoSaveToBuffer();
        }

        function setListStyle(style) {
            exec('insertOrderedList');
            const sel = window.getSelection();
            if (!sel || !sel.rangeCount) return;
            let node = sel.anchorNode;
            while (node && node.nodeType !== Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
                node = node.parentElement;
            }
            if (!node) return;
            const list = node.closest('ol');
            if (!list) return;
            list.style.listStyleType = style;
            switch (style) {
                case 'upper-alpha':
                    list.setAttribute('type', 'A');
                    break;
                case 'lower-alpha':
                    list.setAttribute('type', 'a');
                    break;
                case 'upper-roman':
                    list.setAttribute('type', 'I');
                    break;
                case 'lower-roman':
                    list.setAttribute('type', 'i');
                    break;
                default:
                    list.removeAttribute('type');
                    break;
            }
            autoSaveToBuffer();
        }

        function resetContractWordings() {
            if (!invoiceId) return;
            if (!confirm('Reset this contract wording to a fresh default generated from the attached invoice? This will reload the editor and will not save until you click Save.')) return;
            const currentUrl = new URL(window.location.href);
            currentUrl.searchParams.set('reset', '1');
            window.location.href = currentUrl.toString();
        }

        function openMobileNav() {
            const drawer = document.getElementById('mobileNavDrawer');
            if (drawer) drawer.classList.add('active');
        }

        function closeMobileNav() {
            const drawer = document.getElementById('mobileNavDrawer');
            if (drawer) drawer.classList.remove('active');
        }

        function openIntelligence() {
            // Consolidated into the main mobile drawer for persistence
            openMobileNav();
            // Optional: Scroll to intelligence section in drawer
        }

        function showToast(message, type = 'success') {
            const container = document.getElementById('toastContainer');
            const toast = document.createElement('div');
            toast.className = `toast ${type}`;
            const icon = type === 'success' ? 'fa-check-circle' : 'fa-exclamation-circle';
            toast.innerHTML = `<i class="fas ${icon} ${type === 'success' ? 'text-emerald-500' : 'text-red-500'}"></i> <span>${message}</span>`;
            container.appendChild(toast);

            setTimeout(() => toast.classList.add('show'), 100);
            setTimeout(() => {
                toast.classList.remove('show');
                setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 400);
            }, 4000);
        }

        function autoSaveToBuffer() {
            const fieldMap = { 'body': 'html_content', 'cover': 'cover_html', 'execution': 'execution_html' };
            contractBuffer[fieldMap[currentTab]] = document.getElementById('editor').innerHTML;
        }

        async function loadContractData() {
            try {
                // Parallel fetch for invoice and contract content
                const cacheBuster = `?_=${Date.now()}`;
                const resetMode = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('reset') === '1';
                const contractEndpoint = `/api/contracts/${invoiceId}/${resetMode ? 'reset-html' : 'default-html'}${cacheBuster}`;

                const [invRes, contractRes] = await Promise.all([
                    fetch(`/api/invoices/${invoiceId}${cacheBuster}`, { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` } }),
                    fetch(contractEndpoint, { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` } })
                ]);

                if (invRes.status === 401 && typeof logout === 'function') return logout();

                const invoice = await invRes.json();
                const contract = await contractRes.json();

                // UI mapping
                document.getElementById('invoiceNumber').innerText = invoice.invoice_number;
                document.getElementById('contractRef').innerText = `ID: ${invoice.id.split('-')[0].toUpperCase()}`;
                document.getElementById('clientName').innerText = invoice.clients.full_name;
                document.getElementById('clientEmail').innerText = invoice.clients.email;
                document.getElementById('clientAddress').innerText = invoice.clients.address || 'No address stored';
                document.getElementById('propertyName').innerText = invoice.property_name;
                document.getElementById('propertyLocation').innerText = invoice.property_location;
                document.getElementById('plotSize').innerText = `${invoice.plot_size_sqm} sqm`;
                document.getElementById('invoiceAmount').innerText = `â‚¦${parseFloat(invoice.amount).toLocaleString()}`;

                // Buffer mapping
                contractBuffer = {
                    html_content: contract.html_content || '',
                    cover_html: contract.cover_html || '',
                    execution_html: contract.execution_html || '',
                    lawfirm_name: contract.lawfirm_name || '',
                    lawfirm_address: contract.lawfirm_address || ''
                };

                // Initial render
                document.getElementById('editor').innerHTML = contractBuffer.html_content;
                document.getElementById('editorLoading').classList.add('hidden');

                if (resetMode) {
                    showToast('Loaded fresh contract wording generated from the attached invoice. Click Save to replace the stored draft.', 'success');
                }

                // Orchestration Sync
                await syncOrchestration();

            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Load failed', err);
                document.getElementById('editorLoading').classList.add('hidden');
            }
        }

        async function syncOrchestration() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/contracts/${invoiceId}/status`, {
                    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` }
                });

                const execBtn = document.getElementById('executeBtn');
                const loadingView = document.getElementById('orchestraLoading');
                const contentView = document.getElementById('orchestraContent');

                if (res.status === 404) {
                    renderEmptyOrchestration();
                    if (execBtn) execBtn.classList.add('hidden');
                } else if (res.ok) {
                    const data = await res.json();
                    if (data.status === 'not_started') {
                        renderEmptyOrchestration();
                        if (execBtn) execBtn.classList.add('hidden');
                    } else {
                        renderActiveOrchestration(data);

                        if (data.client_signed && data.witness_signatures.length > 0 && data.status !== 'completed' && data.status !== 'executed') {
                            if (execBtn) {
                                execBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                                execBtn.classList.add('pulse-gold');
                            }
                        } else if (execBtn) {
                            execBtn.classList.add('hidden');
                        }
                    }
                }

                if (loadingView) loadingView.classList.add('hidden');
                if (contentView) contentView.classList.remove('hidden');
            } catch (err) { console.error('Sync failed', err); }
        }

        function renderEmptyOrchestration() {
            const portal = document.getElementById('orchestraContent');
            if (!portal) return;

            if (isReadOnly) {
                portal.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="text-center py-6">
                        <i class="fas fa-clock text-gray-700 text-2xl mb-4"></i>
                        <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest leading-relaxed">No signing session is currently active for this contract.</p>
                    </div>
                `;
                return;
            }

            portal.innerHTML = `
                <div class="text-center py-4">
                    <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-400 mb-6 uppercase tracking-widest leading-relaxed">No signing session has been initiated.</p>
                    <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
                        <button onclick="startSigningSession()" class="w-full py-3 bg-brand-gold text-white font-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest hover:brightness-110 transition rounded-xl shadow pulse-gold">
                            Start E-Sign Portal
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="initiateWalkIn('witness')" class="w-full py-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-gray-300 font-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-white/10 transition rounded-xl">
                            Walk-in Witness
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="initiateWalkIn('client')" class="w-full py-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-gray-300 font-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-white/10 transition rounded-xl">
                            Walk-in Client
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        function renderActiveOrchestration(data) {
            const portal = document.getElementById('orchestraContent');
            if (!portal) return;
            const hasWitness = data.witness_signatures && data.witness_signatures.length > 0;
            const hasClient = data.client_signed;
            const expires = new Date(data.expires_at).toLocaleDateString();

            portal.innerHTML = `
                <div class="space-y-4">
                     <div class="flex flex-col gap-2 mb-6">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center bg-black/20 p-2 rounded-lg">
                            <span class="text-[8px] text-gray-500 uppercase font-bold text-[8px]">Expires: ${expires}</span>
                            ${isReadOnly ? '' : '<button onclick="extendSession()" class="text-[9px] text-brand-gold font-bold uppercase hover:underline border-0 bg-transparent cursor-pointer">Extend</button>'}
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex gap-2">
                             <button onclick="copySigningLink('${data.token}')" class="flex-1 py-1.5 bg-white/5 rounded-lg text-[9px] font-bold uppercase hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/5">Link</button>
                             ${isReadOnly ? '' : '<button onclick="resendLink()" class="flex-1 py-1.5 bg-white/5 rounded-lg text-[9px] font-bold uppercase hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/5">Resend</button>'}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="sig-track-item">
                        <div class="sig-dot ${hasWitness ? 'completed' : 'active'}">${hasWitness ? 'âœ“' : '1'}</div>
                        <div>
                            <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-white">${hasWitness ? data.witness_signatures[0].full_name : 'Witness'}</p>
                            <p class="text-[9px] ${hasWitness ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-gray-500'} font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">${hasWitness ? 'VERIFIED' : 'PENDING'}</p>
                            ${(!hasWitness && !isReadOnly) ? '<button onclick="initiateWalkIn(\'witness\')" class="mt-2 text-[9px] text-brand-gold font-bold uppercase hover:underline border-0 bg-transparent cursor-pointer">Record Walk-in</button>' : ''}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="sig-track-item">
                        <div class="sig-dot ${hasClient ? 'completed' : (hasWitness ? 'active' : '')}">${hasClient ? 'âœ“' : '2'}</div>
                        <div>
                            <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-white">Purchaser</p>
                            <p class="text-[9px] ${hasClient ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-gray-500'} font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">${hasClient ? 'VERIFIED' : 'PENDING'}</p>
                            ${(!hasClient && !isReadOnly) ? '<button onclick="initiateWalkIn(\'client\')" class="mt-2 text-[9px] text-brand-gold font-bold uppercase hover:underline border-0 bg-transparent cursor-pointer">Record Walk-in</button>' : ''}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        async function startSigningSession() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/contracts/session/${invoiceId}`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` }
                });
                if (res.ok) await syncOrchestration();
                else { const d = await res.json(); alert(d.detail || 'Start failed'); }
            } catch (err) { alert('Action failed'); }
        }

        async function extendSession() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/contracts/${invoiceId}/extend`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` }
                });
                if (res.ok) { alert('Extended 48h'); await syncOrchestration(); }
            } catch (err) { alert('Extension failed'); }
        }

        async function resendLink() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/contracts/resend/${invoiceId}`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` }
                });
                if (res.ok) alert('Link resent.');
            } catch (err) { alert('Action failed'); }
        }

        function copySigningLink(token) {
            const url = `${window.location.origin}/sign-contract?token=${token}`;
            navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(() => alert('Copied!')).catch(() => alert('Link: ' + url));
        }

        let walkInRole = null;
        function initiateWalkIn(role) {
            walkInRole = role;
            document.getElementById('walkInModal').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('walkInTitle').innerText = role === 'witness' ? 'Record Walk-in Witness' : 'Record Walk-in Client';
            document.getElementById('witnessInfoFields').classList.toggle('hidden', role !== 'witness');
            clearCanvas();
        }
        function closeWalkInModal() { document.getElementById('walkInModal').classList.add('hidden'); }

        const canvas = document.getElementById('sig-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        let painting = false;
        function startPosition(e) { painting = true; draw(e); }
        function finishedPosition() { painting = false; ctx.beginPath(); }
        function draw(e) {
            if (!painting) return;
            ctx.lineWidth = 3; ctx.lineCap = 'round'; ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b';
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = ((e.clientX || (e.touches && e.touches[0].clientX)) - rect.left);
            const y = ((e.clientY || (e.touches && e.touches[0].clientY)) - rect.top);
            ctx.lineTo(x, y); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x, y);
        }
        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', startPosition);
        canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); startPosition(e); });
        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', finishedPosition);
        canvas.addEventListener('touchend', finishedPosition);
        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', draw);
        canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); draw(e); });
        function clearCanvas() { if (ctx) ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height); }

        async function saveWalkInSignature() {
            const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
            const payload = { signature_base64: dataUrl, signature_method: 'digital' };
            if (walkInRole === 'witness') {
                payload.full_name = document.getElementById('walkInName').value;
                payload.occupation = document.getElementById('walkInOccupation').value;
                payload.address = document.getElementById('walkInAddress').value;
                if (!payload.full_name) return alert('Witness name required');
            }
            try {
                const endpoint = walkInRole === 'witness' ? 'manual-witness' : 'manual-client';
                const res = await fetch(`/api/contracts/${invoiceId}/${endpoint}`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` },
                    body: JSON.stringify(payload)
                });
                if (res.ok) { closeWalkInModal(); await syncOrchestration(); }
                else { const d = await res.json(); alert(d.detail || 'Save failed'); }
            } catch (err) { alert('Save failed'); }
        }

        function switchTab(tab) {
            console.log('Switching to tab:', tab);
            if (tab === currentTab) return;

            // 1. Save current editor state to buffer
            const fieldMap = { 'body': 'html_content', 'cover': 'cover_html', 'execution': 'execution_html' };
            const editorEl = document.getElementById('editor');
            if (editorEl) {
                contractBuffer[fieldMap[currentTab]] = editorEl.innerHTML;
            }

            // 2. Update UI tabs (Desktop)
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => {
                b.classList.remove('active');
                const dot = b.querySelector('.w-2');
                if (dot) dot.classList.add('opacity-30');
            });
            const activeBtn = document.getElementById(`btn-${tab}`);
            if (activeBtn) {
                activeBtn.classList.add('active');
                const activeDot = activeBtn.querySelector('.w-2');
                if (activeDot) activeDot.classList.remove('opacity-30');
            }

            // 3. Update UI (Mobile Bottom Nav)
            document.querySelectorAll('.mob-nav-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });
            const activeMobBtn = document.getElementById(`mob-btn-${tab}`);
            if (activeMobBtn) {
                activeMobBtn.classList.add('active');
            }

            // 4. Update mobile pill label
            const pillLabels = { cover: 'Cover', body: 'Body', execution: 'Sign' };
            const pill = document.getElementById('currentTabPill');
            if (pill) pill.textContent = pillLabels[tab] || tab;

            // 5. Load new state from buffer instantly
            currentTab = tab;
            if (editorEl) {
                // To prevent jumping to end, only update if content actually changed
                const newContent = contractBuffer[fieldMap[tab]] || '';
                if (editorEl.innerHTML !== newContent) {
                    editorEl.innerHTML = newContent;
                }
            }

            // Scroll editor to top
            const workspace = document.querySelector('.editor-workspace');
            if (workspace) workspace.scrollTop = 0;
        }

        async function saveChanges() {
            if (isReadOnly) {
                showToast('Action Forbidden: Your role has read-only access.', 'error');
                return;
            }
            const saveBtn = document.getElementById('saveBtn');
            const saveLabel = document.getElementById('saveLabel');
            const mobileSaveBtn = document.getElementById('mob-btn-save');

            // Update current tab in buffer before saving
            const fieldMap = { 'body': 'html_content', 'cover': 'cover_html', 'execution': 'execution_html' };
            contractBuffer[fieldMap[currentTab]] = document.getElementById('editor').innerHTML;

            const startLoading = () => {
                console.log('Save initiated...');
                saveBtn.disabled = true;
                if (mobileSaveBtn) mobileSaveBtn.disabled = true;
                saveLabel.innerHTML = '<span class="saving-dots">Persisting</span>';
                if (mobileSaveBtn) mobileSaveBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-circle-notch animate-spin text-white"></i>';
            };

            const stopLoading = (success) => {
                saveBtn.disabled = false;
                if (mobileSaveBtn) mobileSaveBtn.disabled = false;
                saveLabel.innerText = success ? 'Draft Saved' : 'Save Draft';
                if (mobileSaveBtn) mobileSaveBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-save text-lg"></i>';
                if (success) setTimeout(() => saveLabel.innerText = 'Save Draft', 2000);
            };

            startLoading();

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/contracts/${invoiceId}/custom-html`, {
                    method: 'PUT',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                        'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}`
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify(contractBuffer)
                });

                if (res.ok) {
                    showToast('Contract draft saved successfully to database.');
                    stopLoading(true);
                } else {
                    const d = await res.json();
                    showToast(`Save failed: ${d.detail || 'Unknown error'}`, 'error');
                    stopLoading(false);
                }
            } catch (err) {
                showToast('Persistence failed. Check your network connection.', 'error');
                stopLoading(false);
            }
        }

        function openExecutionModal() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('executionModal');
            if (modal) {
                const customSeal = document.getElementById('customSealFile');
                if (customSeal) customSeal.value = '';

                const sealedPdf = document.getElementById('sealedPdfFile');
                if (sealedPdf) sealedPdf.value = '';

                const statusBadge = document.getElementById('sealedUploadStatus');
                if (statusBadge) statusBadge.classList.add('hidden');

                const sendBtn = document.getElementById('sendSealedBtn');
                if (sendBtn) {
                    sendBtn.disabled = true;
                    sendBtn.classList.add('opacity-30', 'cursor-not-allowed');
                }

                modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            }
        }
        function closeExecutionModal() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('executionModal');
            if (modal) modal.classList.add('hidden');
        }

        async function executeContract() {
            const includeCert = document.getElementById('sendCertToggle')?.checked;
            const btn = event.target || document.getElementById('confirmExecuteBtn');
            const originalText = btn.innerText;

            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.innerText = 'EXECUTING DEED...';

            try {
                // Handle custom seal if uploaded
                const customSeal = document.getElementById('customSealFile');
                const sealFile = customSeal ? customSeal.files[0] : null;
                if (sealFile) {
                    btn.innerText = 'UPLOADING SEAL...';
                    const sealData = new FormData();
                    sealData.append('file', sealFile);
                    await fetch(`/api/contracts/${invoiceId}/seal`, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` },
                        body: sealData
                    });
                }

                btn.innerText = 'FINALIZING...';
                const res = await fetch(`/api/contracts/execute/${invoiceId}`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ send_certificate: !!includeCert })
                });

                if (res.ok) {
                    alert('Contract successfully sealed and executed.');
                    window.location.href = '/legal';
                } else {
                    const d = await res.json();
                    alert(`Execution failed: ${d.detail || 'Unknown error'}`);
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Execution error', err);
                alert('Fatal error during execution.');
            } finally {
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.innerText = originalText;
            }
        }

        function downloadSealingPDF() {
            window.location.href = `/api/contracts/download-sealing/${invoiceId}?token=${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}`;
        }

        async function uploadSealedPDF() {
            const file = document.getElementById('sealedPdfFile').files[0];
            if (!file) return alert('Please select a PDF file to upload.');

            const btn = document.getElementById('uploadSealedBtn');
            btn.innerText = 'Uploading...';
            btn.disabled = true;

            const formData = new FormData();
            formData.append('file', file);

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/contracts/upload-sealed/${invoiceId}`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` },
                    body: formData
                });

                if (res.ok) {
                    document.getElementById('sealedUploadStatus').classList.remove('hidden');
                    const sendBtn = document.getElementById('sendSealedBtn');
                    if (sendBtn) {
                        sendBtn.disabled = false;
                        sendBtn.classList.remove('opacity-30', 'cursor-not-allowed');
                    }
                } else {
                    const err = await res.json();
                    alert(err.detail || 'Upload failed');
                }
            } catch (err) {
                alert('Upload failed due to connection error.');
            } finally {
                btn.innerText = 'Upload';
                btn.disabled = false;
            }
        }

        async function sendSealedPDF() {
            const btn = document.getElementById('sendSealedBtn');
            if (!btn) return;
            btn.innerText = 'Sending...';
            btn.disabled = true;

            const sendCert = document.getElementById('sendCertToggle')?.checked;

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/contracts/send-sealed/${invoiceId}`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                        'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}`
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ send_certificate: !!sendCert })
                });

                if (res.ok) {
                    alert('Sealed contract finalized, archived, and emailed to the client.');
                    window.location.href = '/legal';
                } else {
                    const err = await res.json();
                    alert(err.detail || 'Failed to send sealed contract');
                }
            } catch (err) {
                alert('Action failed due to connection error.');
            } finally {
                btn.innerText = 'Finalize & Send';
                btn.disabled = false;
            }
        }

        function checkAuth() {
            const token = localStorage.getItem('ec_token');
            const admin = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('admin') || '{}');
            const allowedRoles = ['admin', 'super_admin', 'lawyer', 'legal'];
            const roles = (admin.role || '').toLowerCase().split(',').map(r => r.trim()).filter(Boolean);

            if (!token || !admin.role) {
                window.location.href = '/login';
                return;
            }

            if (!roles.some(role => allowedRoles.includes(role))) {
                alert('Access denied. You do not have permission to open the legal editor.');
                window.location.href = '/dashboard';
                return;
            }
        }
        function logout() { localStorage.clear(); window.location.href = '/login'; }

        // --- Document Preview Modal ---
        function openDocumentPreview(docType) {
            const modal = document.getElementById('documentModal');
            const frame = document.getElementById('documentModalFrame');
            const loader = document.getElementById('documentModalLoader');
            const title = document.getElementById('documentModalTitle');
            const subtitle = document.getElementById('documentModalSubtitle');
            const externalLink = document.getElementById('documentModalExternal');

            // Set Titles
            const titles = {
                'invoice': 'Tax Invoice',
                'receipt': 'Payment Receipt',
                'statement': 'Statement of Account',
                'draft': 'Live Contract Draft'
            };
            title.innerText = titles[docType] || 'Document Preview';
            subtitle.innerText = document.getElementById('propertyName').innerText;

            // Construct URL
            let url = `/api/contracts/${invoiceId}/html-preview/${docType}?token=${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}`;
            if (docType === 'draft') {
                url = `/api/contracts/${invoiceId}/html-draft?token=${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}`;
            }
            externalLink.href = url;

            // Reset state
            modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            loader.style.opacity = '1';
            loader.style.display = 'flex';
            frame.classList.add('hidden');

            // Load content
            frame.src = url;

            frame.onload = () => {
                loader.style.opacity = '0';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    loader.style.display = 'none';
                    frame.classList.remove('hidden');
                }, 300);
            };
        }

        function closeDocumentPreview() {
            const modal = document.getElementById('documentModal');
            const frame = document.getElementById('documentModalFrame');
            modal.classList.add('hidden');
            frame.src = 'about:blank'; // Clear memory
        }
    </script>
</body>

}

        onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter') submitLogin()">
    </div>

    <div class="footer-text">

  <script>
    async function submitLogin() {
      const email = document.getElementById('email').value.trim();
      const password = document.getElementById('password').value;
      const btn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
      const err = document.getElementById('errorMsg');

      if (!email || !password) {
        err.textContent = 'Please enter your email and password.';
        err.style.display = 'block'; return;
      }

      btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Signing in...';
      err.style.display = 'none';

      try {
        const res = await fetch('/auth/login', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ email, password })
        });

        const contentType = res.headers.get("content-type");
        let data;
        if (contentType && contentType.includes("application/json")) {
          data = await res.json();
        } else {
          // User requested friendly crash message for server-side failures
          throw new Error("Server crashed and the engineers are working on it.");
        }

        if (!res.ok) {
          // For 500 errors, use the crash message. For 401/others, use the detail or fallback.
          if (res.status >= 500) throw new Error("Server crashed and the engineers are working on it.");
          throw new Error(data.detail || 'Invalid credentials');
        }
        
        localStorage.setItem('ec_token', data.access_token);
        localStorage.setItem('admin', JSON.stringify(data.admin));

        // Redirection based on Primary Role (Default Interface)
        const primary = (data.admin && data.admin.primary_role) ? data.admin.primary_role.toLowerCase() : '';
        const userRoles = (data.admin.role || '').toLowerCase().split(',').map(r => r.trim()).filter(Boolean);
        const staffType = (data.admin && data.admin.staff_type) ? data.admin.staff_type.toLowerCase() : 'full';

        // Contractors, Labourers, and basic Staff go to HR portal
        if (primary === 'staff' || primary === 'hr' || primary === 'hr_admin' || userRoles.includes('hr_admin') || staffType === 'contractor' || staffType === 'onsite') {
          window.location.href = '/hr';
        } else if (primary === 'marketing' || (userRoles.length === 1 && userRoles[0] === 'marketing')) {
          window.location.href = '/marketing';
        } else if (primary === 'legal' || userRoles.includes('legal') || userRoles.includes('lawyer')) {
          window.location.href = '/legal';
        } else if (primary === 'sales' || primary === 'crm' || userRoles.includes('sales') || userRoles.includes('operations')) {
          window.location.href = '/crm';
        } else {
          window.location.href = '/dashboard';
        }

        // Final override: if we have a "next" param, use it
        const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
        const next = urlParams.get('next');
        if (next) {
            window.location.href = next;
        }
      } catch (e) {
        if (e.name === 'TypeError' || e.message.includes('fetch')) {
          err.textContent = 'Connection lost. Please check your internet and try again.';
        } else {
          err.textContent = e.message;
        }
        err.style.display = 'block';
        btn.disabled = false;
        btn.textContent = 'Sign In';
      }
    }

    // Redirect if already logged in
    // No auto-redirect; let the user sign in or be redirected by dashboard if 401
  </script>
</body>

</html>
