    <!-- TOAST -->
    <div id="toast"><i id="toast-icon" class="fa-solid fa-check-circle"></i><span id="toast-msg">â€”</span></div>

    <script>
        // â”€â”€ STATE â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        const state = {
            step: 1,
            file: null,
            items: [],
            attachments: [],
            profile: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ec_proc_profile') || 'null'),
            submissions: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ec_proc_submissions') || '[]')
        };

        // â”€â”€ INIT â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            // Set today's date
            document.getElementById('v-qdate').valueAsDate = new Date();

            // Check for invitation token in URL â€” e.g. /procurement/portal?token=uuid
            const urlToken = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('token');
            if (urlToken) {
                checkProcurementInvitation(urlToken);
            } else if (state.profile) {
                prefillFromProfile();
                updateTopbarName();
            }
            renderSubmissions();
            renderProfilePage();
            loadProjects();
            syncSubmissionsWithServer();
        });

        // â”€â”€ INVITATION TOKEN CHECK â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        async function checkProcurementInvitation(token) {
            // Show loading on step 1
            const btn = document.querySelector('.btn-primary');
            if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Loadingâ€¦'; }

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/payouts/procurement-portal/invite/${token}`);
                if (res.ok) {
                    const data = await res.json();
                    // Pre-fill email (locked) and vendor data if already registered
                    const emailEl = document.getElementById('v-email');
                    if (emailEl) {
                        emailEl.value = data.email || '';
                        emailEl.readOnly = true;
                        emailEl.style.opacity = '0.7';
                    }
                    // Set project if specified in invite
                    if (data.project) {
                        const projEl = document.getElementById('v-project');
                        if (projEl) projEl.value = data.project;
                    }
                    // If vendor is already in system, auto-fill their details
                    if (data.vendor) {
                        const v = data.vendor;
                        const set = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el && val) el.value = val; };
                        set('v-company', v.name);
                        set('v-contact', v.contact);
                        set('v-phone', v.phone);
                        set('v-rc', v.rc_number);
                        set('v-tin', v.tin);
                        set('v-bank', v.bank_name);
                        set('v-accnum', v.account_number);
                        set('v-accname', v.account_name);
                        updateTopbarName();
                        // Update profile in state
                        state.profile = {
                            company: v.name,
                            contact: v.contact,
                            phone: v.phone,
                            email: data.email,
                            rc: v.rc_number,
                            tin: v.tin,
                            bank: v.bank_name,
                            accnum: v.account_number,
                            accname: v.account_name
                        };
                        toast('success', `Welcome back, ${v.name.split(' ')[0]}! Your details have been pre-filled.`);
                    } else {
                        toast('success', 'Invitation verified. Please fill in your company details.');
                    }
                } else {
                    toast('error', 'This invitation link is invalid or has expired.');
                }
            } catch (e) {
                // Offline/dev â€” just continue normally
                if (state.profile) prefillFromProfile();
            } finally {
                if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = 'Continue <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i>'; }
            }
        }

        // â”€â”€ EMAIL LOOKUP (fetch vendor by email like payout portal) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        async function lookupVendorByEmail() {
            const email = document.getElementById('v-email').value.trim();
            if (!email || !email.includes('@')) return;
            const btn = document.getElementById('btn-lookup-email');
            if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>'; }
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/payouts/portal/fetch-vendor?email=${encodeURIComponent(email)}`);
                if (res.ok) {
                    const result = await res.json();
                    if (result.status === 'success') {
                        const v = result.data;
                        const set = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el && val) el.value = val; };
                        set('v-company', v.name);
                        set('v-contact', v.contact);
                        set('v-phone', v.phone);
                        set('v-rc', v.rc_number);
                        set('v-tin', v.tin);
                        set('v-bank', v.bank_name);
                        set('v-accnum', v.account_number);
                        set('v-accname', v.account_name);
                        if (btn) { btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Found'; btn.style.background = 'var(--success)'; btn.style.color = '#000'; }
                        toast('success', 'Your details have been auto-filled.');
                    } else {
                        if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-user-plus"></i> New'; }
                    }
                } else {
                    if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = 'Lookup'; }
                }
            } catch (e) {
                if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = 'Lookup'; }
            }
        }

        function updateTopbarName() {
            const p = state.profile;
            if (p && p.company) {
                document.getElementById('topbar-vendor-name').textContent = p.company.split(' ').slice(0, 2).join(' ');
            }
        }

        async function checkProcurementInvitation(token) {
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/payouts/procurement-portal/invite/${token}`);
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.status === 'success') {
                    toast('success', 'Invitation validated. Profile pre-filled.');
                    const emailInput = document.getElementById('v-email');
                    emailInput.value = data.email;
                    emailInput.readOnly = true;
                    document.getElementById('btn-identify').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('identify-hint').textContent = 'Invitation linked to this email';

                    if (data.vendor) {
                        const v = data.vendor;
                        const set = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el && val) el.value = val; };
                        set('v-company', v.name);
                        set('v-phone', v.phone);
                        set('v-rc', v.rc_number);
                        set('v-tin', v.tin);
                        set('v-bank', v.bank_name);
                        set('v-accnum', v.account_number);
                        set('v-accname', v.account_name);
                    }
                    if (data.project) {
                        document.getElementById('v-project').value = data.project;
                    }
                } else {
                    toast('error', data.detail || 'Invitation is invalid or expired');
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Invite check failed:', err);
            }
        }

        async function identifyVendor() {
            const email = document.getElementById('v-email').value;
            if (!email || !email.includes('@')) {
                toast('error', 'Please enter a valid email address first');
                return;
            }

            const btn = document.getElementById('btn-identify');
            const originalHtml = btn.innerHTML;
            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin"></i>';

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/payouts/portal/fetch-vendor?email=${encodeURIComponent(email)}`);
                const result = await res.json();

                if (result.status === 'success') {
                    const v = result.data;
                    const set = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el && val) el.value = val; };
                    set('v-company', v.name);
                    set('v-phone', v.phone);
                    set('v-rc', v.rc_number);
                    set('v-tin', v.tin);
                    set('v-bank', v.bank_name);
                    set('v-accnum', v.account_number);
                    set('v-accname', v.account_name);
                    toast('success', `Welcome back, ${v.name}! Profile pre-filled.`);
                } else {
                    toast('info', 'No existing profile found. Please fill in your details.');
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Identify failed:', err);
                toast('error', 'Search failed. Please enter details manually.');
            } finally {
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.innerHTML = originalHtml;
            }
        }

        // â”€â”€ NAVIGATION â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        function showPage(page) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
            document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById('page-' + page).classList.add('active');
            document.getElementById('nav-' + (page === 'new-submission' ? 'new' : page === 'my-submissions' ? 'list' : 'profile')).classList.add('active');
            if (page === 'my-submissions') renderSubmissions();
            if (page === 'profile') renderProfilePage();
        }

        function switchProfileTab(tab, el) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.section-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
            el.classList.add('active');
            document.getElementById('ptab-company').style.display = tab === 'company' ? '' : 'none';
            document.getElementById('ptab-bank').style.display = tab === 'bank' ? '' : 'none';
        }

        // â”€â”€ STEPS â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        function goToStep(n) {
            if (n > state.step) return; // only go back to completed steps
            setStep(n);
        }

        function setStep(n) {
            state.step = n;
            document.getElementById('step-badge').textContent = n;

            for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
                const s = document.getElementById('step-' + i);
                const sn = document.getElementById('sn-' + i);
                s.classList.remove('active', 'done');
                if (i < n) { s.classList.add('done'); sn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-check" style="font-size:10px"></i>'; }
                else if (i === n) { s.classList.add('active'); sn.textContent = i; }
                else { sn.textContent = i; }
            }

            for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
                document.getElementById('panel-' + i).style.display = i === n ? '' : 'none';
            }
            document.getElementById('success-screen').classList.remove('show');
        }

        // â”€â”€ STEP 1 VALIDATION â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        function validateStep1() {
            const fields = [
                { id: 'v-company', group: 'fg-company', check: v => v.trim().length > 1 },
                { id: 'v-contact', group: 'fg-contact', check: v => v.trim().length > 1 },
                { id: 'v-phone', group: 'fg-phone', check: v => v.trim().length >= 7 },
                { id: 'v-email', group: 'fg-email', check: v => /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(v) },
                { id: 'v-type', group: 'fg-vtype', check: v => v !== '' },
                { id: 'v-bank', group: 'fg-bank', check: v => v !== '' },
                { id: 'v-accnum', group: 'fg-accnum', check: v => /^\d{10}$/.test(v) },
                { id: 'v-accname', group: 'fg-accname', check: v => v.trim().length > 1 },
            ];
            let ok = true;
            fields.forEach(f => {
                const v = document.getElementById(f.id).value;
                const g = document.getElementById(f.group);
                if (!f.check(v)) { g.classList.add('has-error'); ok = false; }
                else g.classList.remove('has-error');
            });
            if (!ok) { toast('error', 'Please fill in all required fields'); return; }

            // Save profile snapshot
            state.profile = {
                company: document.getElementById('v-company').value,
                contact: document.getElementById('v-contact').value,
                phone: document.getElementById('v-phone').value,
                email: document.getElementById('v-email').value,
                rc: document.getElementById('v-rc').value,
                tin: document.getElementById('v-tin').value,
                type: document.getElementById('v-type').value,
                address: document.getElementById('v-address').value,
                bank: document.getElementById('v-bank').value,
                accnum: document.getElementById('v-accnum').value,
                accname: document.getElementById('v-accname').value,
            };
            localStorage.setItem('ec_proc_profile', JSON.stringify(state.profile));
            updateTopbarName();
            setStep(2);
        }

        // â”€â”€ FILE UPLOAD â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        function handleDrag(e, over) {
            e.preventDefault();
            document.getElementById('upload-zone').classList.toggle('drag-over', over);
        }
        function handleDrop(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            document.getElementById('upload-zone').classList.remove('drag-over');
            const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
            if (file) processFile(file);
        }
        function handleFileSelect(e) {
            const file = e.target.files[0];
            if (file) processFile(file);
        }
        function processFile(file) {
            const allowed = ['xlsx', 'xls', 'csv'];
            const ext = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
            if (!allowed.includes(ext)) { toast('error', 'Please upload an XLSX, XLS or CSV file'); return; }
            state.file = file;
            document.getElementById('file-name-display').textContent = file.name;
            document.getElementById('file-size-display').textContent = (file.size / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB';
            document.getElementById('file-attached').classList.add('show');
            document.getElementById('btn-parse').disabled = false;
            toast('success', 'File attached â€” click "Parse & Review" to continue');
        }
        function removeFile() {
            state.file = null;
            document.getElementById('file-attached').classList.remove('show');
            document.getElementById('btn-parse').disabled = true;
            document.getElementById('file-input').value = '';
        }

        async function handleAttachmentSelect(e) {
            const files = Array.from(e.target.files);
            for (const file of files) {
                await uploadAttachment(file);
            }
        }

        async function uploadAttachment(file) {
            const id = Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
            const list = document.getElementById('attachments-list');

            const item = document.createElement('div');
            item.className = 'file-attached show';
            item.id = `att-${id}`;
            item.innerHTML = `
                <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin"></i>
                <div class="file-attached-info">
                    <div class="file-name">${file.name}</div>
                    <div class="file-size">Uploading...</div>
                </div>
            `;
            list.appendChild(item);

            const formData = new FormData();
            formData.append('file', file);

            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/payouts/procurement-portal/upload', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    body: formData
                });
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.status === 'success') {
                    item.innerHTML = `
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-file-circle-check" style="color:var(--success)"></i>
                        <div class="file-attached-info">
                            <div class="file-name">${file.name}</div>
                            <div class="file-size">${(file.size / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB</div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="file-remove" onclick="removeAttachment('${id}', '${data.path}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button>
                    `;
                    state.attachments.push(data.path);
                } else {
                    item.innerHTML = `<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-xmark" style="color:var(--error)"></i> <div class="file-attached-info"><div class="file-name">${file.name}</div><div class="file-size" style="color:var(--error)">Upload failed</div></div>`;
                }
            } catch (err) {
                item.innerHTML = `<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-xmark" style="color:var(--error)"></i> <div class="file-attached-info"><div class="file-name">${file.name}</div><div class="file-size" style="color:var(--error)">Network error</div></div>`;
            }
        }

        function removeAttachment(id, path) {
            document.getElementById(`att-${id}`).remove();
            state.attachments = state.attachments.filter(p => p !== path);
        }

        // â”€â”€ UPLOAD MODE TOGGLE â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        let portalMode = 'upload'; // 'upload' | 'manual'

        function setPortalMode(mode) {
            portalMode = mode;
            document.getElementById('mode-btn-upload').classList.toggle('active', mode === 'upload');
            document.getElementById('mode-btn-manual').classList.toggle('active', mode === 'manual');
            document.getElementById('upload-mode-ui').style.display = mode === 'upload' ? '' : 'none';
            document.getElementById('manual-mode-ui').style.display = mode === 'manual' ? '' : 'none';
            const btn = document.getElementById('btn-parse');
            if (mode === 'manual') {
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.innerHTML = 'Continue to Items <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i>';
            } else {
                btn.disabled = !state.file;
                btn.innerHTML = 'Parse & Review <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i>';
            }
        }

        function validateStep2() {
            const proj = document.getElementById('v-project');
            const fg = document.getElementById('fg-proj');
            if (!proj.value) { fg.classList.add('has-error'); toast('error', 'Please select a project'); return false; }
            fg.classList.remove('has-error');
            return true;
        }

        // â”€â”€ PARSE FILE â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        function parseAndGoToStep3() {
            if (!validateStep2()) return;

            // Manual mode â€” skip parsing, go straight to editable table
            if (portalMode === 'manual') {
                if (state.items.length === 0) {
                    state.items = [makeItem('', 1, 'Pcs', 0, 0)];
                }
                renderTable();
                setStep(3);
                setTimeout(() => {
                    const first = document.querySelector('#items-tbody td input[type="text"]');
                    if (first) first.focus();
                }, 100);
                return;
            }

            // Upload mode â€” must have a file
            if (!state.file) { toast('error', 'No file selected'); return; }

            const btn = document.getElementById('btn-parse');
            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin"></i> Parsingâ€¦';

            const ext = state.file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
            const reader = new FileReader();

            reader.onload = function (e) {
                try {
                    let rows = [];
                    if (ext === 'csv') {
                        rows = parseCSV(e.target.result);
                    } else {
                        const data = new Uint8Array(e.target.result);
                        const wb = XLSX.read(data, { type: 'array' });
                        const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]];
                        rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(ws, { header: 1, defval: '' });
                    }
                    const parsed = detectAndParse(rows);
                    if (parsed.length === 0) {
                        toast('warning', 'No items auto-detected. Add them manually in the table below.');
                        state.items = [makeItem('', 1, 'Pcs', 0, 0)];
                    } else {
                        state.items = parsed;
                        toast('success', `Parsed ${parsed.length} item${parsed.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} â€” review and confirm`);
                    }
                    renderTable();
                    setStep(3);
                } catch (err) {
                    toast('error', 'Could not parse file: ' + err.message);
                } finally {
                    btn.disabled = false;
                    btn.innerHTML = 'Parse & Review <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i>';
                }
            };

            reader.onerror = function () {
                toast('error', 'Failed to read file. Please try again.');
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.innerHTML = 'Parse & Review <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i>';
            };

            if (ext === 'csv') reader.readAsText(state.file);
            else reader.readAsArrayBuffer(state.file);
        }

        function parseCSV(text) {
            const lines = text.trim().split(/\r?\n/);
            return lines.map(line => {
                const cells = [];
                let cur = '', inQ = false;
                for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i++) {
                    if (line[i] === '"') { inQ = !inQ; continue; }
                    if (line[i] === ',' && !inQ) { cells.push(cur.trim()); cur = ''; }
                    else cur += line[i];
                }
                cells.push(cur.trim());
                return cells;
            });
        }

        function detectAndParse(rows) {
            // Find header row â€” search up to row 25, need â‰¥2 keyword hits
            const headerKw = ['description', 'item', 'material', 'name', 'work', 'service', 'particulars',
                'qty', 'quantity', 'unit', 'uom', 'price', 'rate', 'amount', 'total', 'sum', 'value'];
            let headerIdx = -1;
            for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(rows.length, 25); i++) {
                const row = rows[i].map(c => String(c).toLowerCase().trim());
                const matches = headerKw.filter(k => row.some(c => c.includes(k)));
                if (matches.length >= 2) { headerIdx = i; break; }
            }

            const items = [];
            if (headerIdx < 0) {
                // No header detected â€” treat non-empty rows with â‰¥2 cells as data
                for (let i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
                    const r = rows[i];
                    if (!r || r.every(c => !String(c).trim())) continue;
                    const nonEmpty = r.filter(c => String(c).trim());
                    if (nonEmpty.length < 2) continue;
                    const item = makeItem(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4]);
                    if (item.description) items.push(item);
                }
            } else {
                // Map columns by keyword matching
                const header = rows[headerIdx].map(c => String(c).toLowerCase().trim());
                const col = (kws) => header.findIndex(h => kws.some(k => h.includes(k)));
                const cDesc = col(['description', 'item', 'material', 'name', 'work', 'service', 'particulars', 'goods', 'supply']);
                const cQty = col(['qty', 'quantity', 'no.', 'nos', 'units']);
                const cUnit = col(['unit', 'uom', 'measure', 'm2', 'm3']);
                const cUp = col(['unit price', 'unit cost', 'rate', 'price/unit', 'uprice', 'u/price', 'unit_price']);
                const cAmt = col(['amount', 'total', 'sum', 'value', 'subtotal', 'sub-total', 'sub total']);

                for (let i = headerIdx + 1; i < rows.length; i++) {
                    const r = rows[i];
                    if (!r || r.every(c => !String(c).trim())) continue;
                    const desc = String(cDesc >= 0 ? r[cDesc] : r[0] || '').trim();
                    if (!desc) continue;
                    // Skip footer/summary rows
                    if (/^(total|subtotal|grand total|vat|tax|note|remark|prepared by|approved|signature)/i.test(desc)) continue;
                    const qty = cQty >= 0 ? r[cQty] : '';
                    const unit = cUnit >= 0 ? r[cUnit] : '';
                    const up = cUp >= 0 ? r[cUp] : '';
                    const amt = cAmt >= 0 ? r[cAmt] : '';
                    items.push(makeItem(desc, qty, unit, up, amt));
                }
            }
            return items.filter(it => it.description.trim());
        }

        function makeItem(desc = '', qty = '', unit = '', uprice = '', amount = '', extra = '') {
            const q = parseNum(qty) || 1;
            const u = parseNum(uprice) || parseNum(amount) / q || 0;
            const a = parseNum(amount) || (q * u);
            return {
                description: String(desc).trim(),
                category: guessCategory(String(desc)),
                qty: q,
                unit: String(unit).trim() || 'Pcs',
                unitPrice: u,
                amount: a || q * u,
            };
        }

        function parseNum(v) {
            if (v === null || v === undefined || v === '') return 0;
            const s = String(v).replace(/[â‚¦,\s]/g, '');
            const n = parseFloat(s);
            return isNaN(n) ? 0 : n;
        }

        const catMap = {
            'Fencing': ['fence', 'chain link', 'barbed', 'iron rod', 'railing', 'gate', 'wire'],
            'Site Clearing': ['clearing', 'excavat', 'demolish', 'bush', 'grading', 'cut', 'fill', 'earthwork'],
            'Concrete Works': ['concrete', 'cement', 'sand', 'gravel', 'granite', 'block', 'mortar', 'rendering', 'plaster', 'screed'],
            'Labour': ['labour', 'labor', 'worker', 'mason', 'carpenter', 'painter', 'plumber', 'artisan', 'supervisor'],
            'Materials': ['material', 'supply', 'timber', 'board', 'ply', 'steel', 'pipe', 'fitting', 'roofing', 'sheet', 'zinc'],
            'Electrical': ['electrical', 'wire', 'cable', 'conduit', 'bulb', 'switch', 'socket', 'panel', 'breaker', 'generator'],
            'Plumbing': ['plumbing', 'water', 'tank', 'pump', 'drain', 'sewage', 'pipe', 'valve', 'toilet', 'bathroom'],
            'Equipment': ['equipment', 'machine', 'crane', 'excavator', 'mixer', 'generator', 'hire', 'rent', 'plant'],
            'Finishing': ['finish', 'paint', 'tile', 'floor', 'ceiling', 'door', 'window', 'glass', 'aluminium', 'frame'],
            'Professional': ['survey', 'design', 'consult', 'architect', 'engineer', 'inspect', 'service', 'fee'],
        };

        function guessCategory(desc) {
            const d = desc.toLowerCase();
            for (const [cat, kws] of Object.entries(catMap)) {
                if (kws.some(k => d.includes(k))) return cat;
            }
            return 'General';
        }

        // â”€â”€ TABLE RENDERING â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        const CATEGORIES = ['Fencing', 'Site Clearing', 'Concrete Works', 'Labour', 'Materials', 'Electrical', 'Plumbing', 'Equipment', 'Finishing', 'Professional', 'General'];

        function renderTable() {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('items-tbody');
            if (!state.items.length) {
                tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="8"><div class="empty-table"><i class="fa-solid fa-inbox"></i>No items yet</div></td></tr>';
                updateTotal();
                return;
            }
            tbody.innerHTML = state.items.map((item, i) => `
    <tr data-idx="${i}">
      <td class="td-row-num">${i + 1}</td>
      <td><input type="text" class="no-icon" value="${esc(item.description)}" onchange="updateItem(${i},'description',this.value)" placeholder="Item descriptionâ€¦"></td>
      <td>
        <select class="no-icon" onchange="updateItem(${i},'category',this.value)">
          ${CATEGORIES.map(c => `<option ${c === item.category ? 'selected' : ''}>${c}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>
      </td>
      <td><input type="number" class="no-icon" value="${item.qty}" min="0" step="any" onchange="updateItem(${i},'qty',this.value)"></td>
      <td><input type="text" class="no-icon" value="${esc(item.unit)}" onchange="updateItem(${i},'unit',this.value)" placeholder="Pcs"></td>
      <td><input type="number" class="no-icon" value="${item.unitPrice}" min="0" step="any" onchange="updateItem(${i},'unitPrice',this.value)"></td>
      <td class="td-amount">${fmt(item.amount)}</td>
      <td class="td-actions"><button class="row-del-btn" onclick="deleteRow(${i})"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button></td>
    </tr>
  `).join('');
            updateTotal();
            document.getElementById('row-count-label').textContent = `${state.items.length} item${state.items.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
        }

        function updateItem(idx, field, val) {
            state.items[idx][field] = field === 'qty' || field === 'unitPrice' ? parseFloat(val) || 0 : val;
            if (field === 'qty' || field === 'unitPrice') {
                state.items[idx].amount = state.items[idx].qty * state.items[idx].unitPrice;
                // update amount cell
                const rows = document.getElementById('items-tbody').querySelectorAll('tr');
                rows[idx].querySelector('.td-amount').textContent = fmt(state.items[idx].amount);
            }
            if (field === 'description') state.items[idx].category = guessCategory(val);
            updateTotal();
        }

        function deleteRow(idx) {
            state.items.splice(idx, 1);
            renderTable();
        }

        function addRow() {
            state.items.push({ description: '', category: 'General', qty: 1, unit: 'Pcs', unitPrice: 0, amount: 0 });
            renderTable();
            // focus last description
            const rows = document.getElementById('items-tbody').querySelectorAll('tr');
            if (rows.length) rows[rows.length - 1].querySelector('input').focus();
        }

        function recalcAll() {
            state.items.forEach(it => { it.amount = it.qty * it.unitPrice; });
            renderTable();
            toast('success', 'All amounts recalculated');
        }

        function updateTotal() {
            const total = state.items.reduce((s, it) => s + (it.amount || 0), 0);
            document.getElementById('grand-total').textContent = fmt(total);
        }

        function validateStep3() {
            if (!state.items.length) { toast('error', 'Add at least one item before continuing'); return; }
            const empty = state.items.filter(it => !it.description.trim());
            if (empty.length) { toast('error', 'Some items have empty descriptions'); return; }
            buildReviewPanel();
            setStep(4);
        }

        function buildReviewPanel() {
            const total = state.items.reduce((s, it) => s + (it.amount || 0), 0);
            const vat = total * 0.075;
            const p = state.profile;
            const proj = document.getElementById('v-project').options[document.getElementById('v-project').selectedIndex].text;
            const ref = document.getElementById('v-qtitle').value || 'Quotation ' + new Date().toLocaleDateString();

            document.getElementById('rev-item-count').textContent = state.items.length;
            document.getElementById('rev-total').textContent = fmt(total);
            document.getElementById('rev-vat').textContent = fmt(vat);
            document.getElementById('rev-vendor').textContent = `${p.company} â€” ${p.contact}`;
            document.getElementById('rev-project').textContent = proj;
            document.getElementById('rev-bank').textContent = `${p.bank} Â· ${p.accnum} Â· ${p.accname}`;
            document.getElementById('rev-ref').textContent = ref;
        }

        // â”€â”€ SUBMIT â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        async function submitProcurement() {
            const btn = document.getElementById('btn-submit');
            btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin"></i> Submittingâ€¦';

            const ref = 'PCQ-' + Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase();
            const total = state.items.reduce((s, it) => s + (it.amount || 0), 0);
            const p = state.profile;
            const projEl = document.getElementById('v-project');

            const payload = {
                ref,
                title: document.getElementById('v-qtitle').value || 'Procurement Quotation',
                project: projEl.value,
                projectName: projEl.options[projEl.selectedIndex].text,
                vendor_name: p.company,
                contact_name: p.contact,
                phone: p.phone,
                email: p.email,
                rc_number: p.rc,
                tin: p.tin,
                bank_name: p.bank,
                account_number: p.accnum,
                account_name: p.accname,
                total_amount: total,
                notes: document.getElementById('v-notes').value,
                line_items: state.items.map(it => ({
                    description: it.description,
                    category: it.category,
                    qty: it.qty,
                    unit: it.unit,
                    unitPrice: it.unitPrice,
                    amount: it.amount,
                })),
                attachments: state.attachments
            };

            // â”€â”€ Local snapshot (always â€” for offline / dev fallback) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
            const localSnap = {
                id: ref, ref,
                title: payload.title,
                project: payload.project,
                projectName: payload.projectName,
                vendor: p.company, vendor_name: p.company,
                contact: p.contact, contact_name: p.contact,
                phone: p.phone, email: p.email,
                bank: p.bank, bank_name: p.bank,
                accnum: p.accnum, account_number: p.accnum,
                accname: p.accname, account_name: p.accname,
                tin: p.tin, rc: p.rc, rc_number: p.rc,
                items: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.items)),
                line_items: payload.line_items,
                total, total_amount: total,
                notes: payload.notes,
                status: 'pending',
                date: new Date().toISOString(),
                submitted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
            };
            state.submissions.unshift(localSnap);
            localStorage.setItem('ec_proc_submissions', JSON.stringify(state.submissions));

            // â”€â”€ API call (best-effort â€” success screen shows regardless) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/payouts/procurement-submissions', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(payload),
                });
                if (!res.ok) {
                    const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
                    console.warn('Submission API error:', err.detail || res.status);
                    // Still show success â€” data is persisted locally
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.warn('Submission API unreachable, saved locally:', err.message);
            }

            // â”€â”€ Show success â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
            for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) document.getElementById('panel-' + i).style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('success-ref').textContent = 'REF: ' + ref;
            document.getElementById('success-screen').classList.add('show');
            btn.disabled = false;
            btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane"></i> Submit for Approval';
        }

        function resetForm() {
            state.items = [];
            state.file = null;
            state.step = 1;
            setPortalMode('upload');
            document.getElementById('success-screen').classList.remove('show');
            // clear form fields
            ['v-company', 'v-contact', 'v-phone', 'v-email', 'v-rc', 'v-tin', 'v-address',
                'v-accnum', 'v-accname', 'v-qtitle', 'v-notes'].forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value = '');
            ['v-type', 'v-bank', 'v-project'].forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value = '');
            document.getElementById('file-attached').classList.remove('show');
            document.getElementById('btn-parse').disabled = true;
            // Pre-fill saved profile
            if (state.profile) prefillFromProfile();
            setStep(1);
        }

        function prefillFromProfile() {
            const p = state.profile;
            const set = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el && val) el.value = val; };
            set('v-company', p.company); set('v-contact', p.contact);
            set('v-phone', p.phone); set('v-email', p.email);
            set('v-rc', p.rc); set('v-tin', p.tin);
            set('v-type', p.type); set('v-address', p.address);
            set('v-bank', p.bank); set('v-accnum', p.accnum); set('v-accname', p.accname);
        }

        // â”€â”€ SYNC WITH SERVER â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        async function syncSubmissionsWithServer() {
            const emailInput = document.getElementById('v-email');
            const email = (emailInput ? emailInput.value : '') || (state.profile ? state.profile.email : '');
            if (!email) return;

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/payouts/procurement-portal/submissions?email=${encodeURIComponent(email)}`);
                if (res.ok) {
                    const serverSubs = await res.json();
                    if (serverSubs && Array.isArray(serverSubs)) {
                        // Merge or replace local state
                        // We'll replace for now to ensure status accuracy
                        state.submissions = serverSubs;
                        localStorage.setItem('ec_proc_submissions', JSON.stringify(state.submissions));
                        renderSubmissions();
                    }
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.warn('Failed to sync submissions with server:', err);
            }
        }

        // â”€â”€ SUBMISSIONS LIST â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        function renderSubmissions() {
            const container = document.getElementById('submissions-list');
            if (!state.submissions.length) {
                container.innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:center;padding:60px;color:var(--muted)"><i class="fa-solid fa-inbox" style="font-size:32px;display:block;margin-bottom:12px;opacity:0.4"></i>No submissions yet</div>`;
                return;
            }
            container.innerHTML = state.submissions.map(s => `
    <div class="submission-card">
      <div class="sub-status-dot ${s.status}"></div>
      <div class="sub-info">
        <div class="sub-ref">${s.ref}</div>
        <div class="sub-title">${s.title}</div>
        <div class="sub-meta">${s.projectName || 'Procurement Project'} Â· ${new Date(s.submitted_at || s.date).toLocaleDateString('en-NG', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' })}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sub-amount">
        <div class="sub-amount-val">${fmt(s.total_amount || s.total || 0)}</div>
        <span class="sub-status-badge badge-${s.status}">${s.status}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
        }

        // â”€â”€ PROFILE PAGE â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        function renderProfilePage() {
            const p = state.profile;
            if (!p) return;
            document.getElementById('prof-company-name').textContent = p.company || 'â€”';
            document.getElementById('prof-category').textContent = p.type || 'â€”';
            document.getElementById('prof-avatar').textContent = (p.company || '?')[0].toUpperCase();
            const isVerified = p.rc || p.tin;
            document.getElementById('prof-status').textContent = isVerified ? 'Verified' : 'Unverified';
            document.getElementById('prof-status').className = 'profile-status ' + (isVerified ? 'verified' : 'unverified');

            const set = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = val || ''; };
            set('p-company', p.company); set('p-contact', p.contact);
            set('p-phone', p.phone); set('p-email', p.email);
            set('p-rc', p.rc); set('p-tin', p.tin);
            set('p-bank', p.bank); set('p-accnum', p.accnum); set('p-accname', p.accname);
        }

        function saveProfile() {
            const updated = {
                ...state.profile,
                company: document.getElementById('p-company').value,
                contact: document.getElementById('p-contact').value,
                phone: document.getElementById('p-phone').value,
                email: document.getElementById('p-email').value,
                rc: document.getElementById('p-rc').value,
                tin: document.getElementById('p-tin').value,
                bank: document.getElementById('p-bank').value,
                accnum: document.getElementById('p-accnum').value,
                accname: document.getElementById('p-accname').value,
            };
            state.profile = updated;
            localStorage.setItem('ec_proc_profile', JSON.stringify(updated));
            renderProfilePage();
            updateTopbarName();
            toast('success', 'Profile updated successfully');
        }

        // â”€â”€ UTILITIES â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        function fmt(n) {
            return 'â‚¦' + (n || 0).toLocaleString('en-NG', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
        }
        function esc(s) { return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/</g, '&lt;'); }

        let toastTimer;
        function toast(type, msg) {
            const el = document.getElementById('toast');
            document.getElementById('toast-icon').className = type === 'success' ? 'fa-solid fa-check-circle' : 'fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation';
            document.getElementById('toast-msg').textContent = msg;
            el.className = 'show ' + type;
            clearTimeout(toastTimer);
            toastTimer = setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('show'), 3800);
        }
        async function loadProjects() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/payouts/procurement-portal/projects');
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.status === 'success') {
                    const select = document.getElementById('v-project');
                    if (select) {
                        // Preserve the first option ("Select project...")
                        select.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select projectâ€¦</option>';
                        data.data.forEach(p => {
                            const opt = document.createElement('option');
                            opt.value = p.id;
                            opt.textContent = p.name;
                            select.appendChild(opt);
                        });
                    }
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to load projects:', err);
            }
        }
    </script>
</body>

</html>

                            ondragleave="this.classList.remove('border-gold')" ondrop="handleReceiptDrop(event)">
                            <i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt text-2xl text-gray-400 mb-2"></i>
                            <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">Click or drag &amp; drop files here</p>
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">JPG, PNG, WEBP or PDF â€” you can select multiple files
                            </p>
                            <input type="file" id="payment_receipt" name="payment_receipt"
                                accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp,application/pdf" multiple required
                                class="hidden" onchange="handleReceiptFiles(this.files)">
                        </div>

                        <!-- Per-file status list -->
                        <ul id="receiptFileList" class="mt-3 space-y-2 hidden"></ul>

                        <!-- Hidden field that carries the final URL(s) as a JSON array -->
                        <input type="hidden" name="payment_receipt_urls" id="payment_receipt_urls">
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Step 6: Review & Sign -->
                <div class="form-card" data-step="6">
                    <h2 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-2">Finalize & Sign</h2>
                    <p class="text-muted mb-8">Please review all information and provide your signature.</p>

                    <!-- Terms Content -->
                    <div
                        class="bg-gray-50 p-6 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 mb-8 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto text-sm text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                        <h3 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">DECLARATION & CONSENT</h3>
                        By checking the box below, I confirm that I have read, understand, and consent to all of the
                        following Eximp & Cloves Infrastructure limited documents:
                        <a href="https://eximps-cloves.com/terms" target="_blank"
                            class="text-gold font-bold underline">Terms and Conditions</a>,
                        <a href="https://eximps-cloves.com/terms" target="_blank"
                            class="text-gold font-bold underline">Payment Protection Promise</a> and
                        <a href="https://eximps-cloves.com/refund" target="_blank"
                            class="text-gold font-bold underline">Refund Policies</a>.
                        I accept full responsibility for all legal implications and interpretations of this agreement. I
                        understand that this subscription form becomes binding on all parties immediately upon the
                        company's
                        receipt of my payment.
                    </div>

                    <div class="flex items-start gap-3 mb-8">
                        <input type="checkbox" id="consent" required
                            class="mt-1 w-5 h-5 rounded border-gray-300 text-gold focus:ring-gold">
                        <label for="consent" class="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">I Agree to the Terms & Conditions
                            and
                            understand all legal implications.</label>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Signature Pad -->
                    <div class="mb-6">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                            <label class="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">Client Signature <span
                                    class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                            <div class="flex gap-4 items-center">
                                <label
                                    class="text-xs text-blue-600 font-bold hover:underline cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1">
                                    <i class="fas fa-upload"></i> UPLOAD IMAGE
                                    <input type="file" accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp" class="hidden"
                                        onchange="uploadSignatureImage(this)">
                                </label>
                                <span class="text-gray-300">|</span>
                                <button type="button" onclick="clearSignature()"
                                    class="text-xs text-red-500 font-bold hover:underline">CLEAR</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <canvas id="signature-pad" class="sig-pad w-full h-48"></canvas>
                        <p class="text-center text-[10px] text-muted mt-2 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold">Sign or
                            Upload Inside the Box Above</p>

                        <!-- Data Collection Notice -->
                        <div class="mt-4 flex items-start gap-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-shield-alt text-gray-400 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0 text-sm"></i>
                            <p class="text-[11px] text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">
                                <span class="font-semibold text-gray-600">Digital Signature Notice:</span>
                                For legal verification and audit purposes, your
                                <span class="font-medium text-gray-600">IP address</span>,
                                <span class="font-medium text-gray-600">device type</span>, and
                                <span class="font-medium text-gray-600">browser user agent</span>
                                are automatically recorded at the time of signing â€” whether you draw your signature or
                                upload a scanned copy.
                                This information is securely stored and used solely to authenticate this document.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="mt-6 relative" id="salesRepSearchGroup">
                        <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2">Referring Representative / Realtor
                            (Optional)</label>
                        <div class="relative">
                            <i class="fas fa-user-tie absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-muted"></i>
                            <input type="text" id="salesRepSearch" name="sales_rep_name" autocomplete="off"
                                class="w-full p-3 pl-12 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gold outline-none"
                                placeholder="Search by name or phone number...">
                            <input type="hidden" name="sales_rep_id" id="sales_rep_id"
                                value="{{ rep.id if rep else '' }}">
                        </div>
                        <div id="salesRepList" class="autocomplete-list shadow-2xl border-gold/20"></div>
                        {% if rep %}
                        <p class="text-[10px] text-green-600 font-bold mt-1 uppercase tracking-wider"><i
                                class="fas fa-link mr-1"></i> Attribution Linked to {{ rep.name }}</p>
                        {% endif %}
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Navigation -->
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center pt-8 border-top border-gray-100">
                    <button type="button" id="prevBtn" onclick="changeStep(-1)" class="nav-button hidden">
                        <i class="fas fa-arrow-left mr-2"></i> Previous
                    </button>
                    <div class="flex-1"></div>
                    <button type="button" id="nextBtn" onclick="changeStep(1)" class="gold-button">
                        Next Step <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                    </button>
                    <button type="submit" id="submitBtn" class="gold-button hidden">
                        Complete Subscription <i class="fas fa-check-circle ml-2"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>

            </form>

        </div><!-- end #formSection -->
    </main>

    <!-- SUCCESS MODAL -->
    <div id="successModal" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-6 hidden">
        <div class="bg-white rounded-3xl p-10 max-w-sm w-full text-center shadow-2xl">
            <div class="w-20 h-20 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-6">
                <i class="fas fa-check text-4xl text-green-500 animate-bounce"></i>
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-2">Form Submitted!</h3>
            <p class="text-muted mb-4">Your subscription is being processed.</p>
            <div class="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-2xl mb-8">
                <p class="text-[10px] text-muted uppercase font-bold tracking-widest mb-1">Invoice Number</p>
                <p id="successInvoiceNum" class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">INC-XXXX</p>
            </div>
            <button onclick="window.location.reload()" class="gold-button w-full">Done</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CO-OWNER MODAL -->
    <div id="coOwnerModal"
        class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 hidden">
        <div class="bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 max-w-lg w-full shadow-2xl relative max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
            <button type="button" onclick="closeCoOwnerModal()"
                class="absolute top-4 right-4 w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-500">
                <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
            </button>
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6 border-b border-gray-100 pb-4">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gold-light/30 flex items-center justify-center text-gold">
                    <i class="fas fa-users"></i>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Co-Owner Details</h3>
                    <p class="text-xs text-muted">Required for Joint Ownership</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Inline error banner for co-owner modal -->
            <div id="coOwnerErrorBanner"
                class="hidden bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-xl p-3 mb-4 text-red-700 text-sm"></div>

            <div class="space-y-4">
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1">Full Name <span
                            class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                    <input type="text" id="modal_co_owner_name" required
                        class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:border-gold outline-none"
                        placeholder="Full name">
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1">Residential Address <span
                            class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                    <input type="text" id="modal_co_owner_address" required
                        class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:border-gold outline-none"
                        placeholder="Full home address">
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1">Occupation</label>
                    <input type="text" id="modal_co_owner_occupation" required
                        class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:border-gold outline-none"
                        placeholder="e.g. Engineer">
                </div>
                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1">Phone Number <span
                                class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                        <input type="tel" id="modal_co_owner_phone" required
                            class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:border-gold outline-none"
                            placeholder="+234...">
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1">Email Address</label>
                        <input type="email" id="modal_co_owner_email" required
                            class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:border-gold outline-none"
                            placeholder="email@example.com">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="pt-4">
                    <button type="button" onclick="saveCoOwner()" class="gold-button w-full shadow-lg">Save Co-Owner
                        Details</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let currentStep = 1;
        const totalSteps = 6;
        let activeUploads = 0;
        const form = document.getElementById('subscriptionForm');
        let signaturePad;

        // Initialize Signature Pad
        function initSignaturePad() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('signature-pad');
            const ratio = Math.max(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 1);
            canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth * ratio;
            canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight * ratio;
            canvas.getContext("2d").scale(ratio, ratio);
            signaturePad = new SignaturePad(canvas, {
                penColor: "rgb(0, 0, 0)"
            });
        }

        function clearSignature() { if (signaturePad) signaturePad.clear(); }

        // Upload Signature Image to Canvas
        function uploadSignatureImage(input) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                const file = input.files[0];
                const allowedMimeTypes = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp'];
                const ext = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
                const allowedExts = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp'];

                if (!allowedMimeTypes.includes(file.type) && !allowedExts.includes(ext)) {
                    alert("Unsupported signature format. Please upload your signature as a clear Image (JPG, PNG).");
                    input.value = '';
                    return;
                }
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (e) {
                    const img = new Image();
                    img.onload = function () {
                        const canvas = document.getElementById('signature-pad');
                        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

                        // FIX: The canvas context has already been scaled by devicePixelRatio
                        // in initSignaturePad (via ctx.scale(ratio, ratio)). All drawing
                        // operations must therefore use LOGICAL (CSS) pixel dimensions â€”
                        // i.e. canvas.width / dpr â€” not the raw physical pixel dimensions.
                        // Using raw dimensions here caused uploaded signatures to render
                        // far outside the visible canvas area on high-DPI (Retina) screens,
                        // producing a blank/corrupted snapshot when toDataURL() was called.
                        const dpr = Math.max(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 1);
                        const logicalWidth = canvas.width / dpr;
                        const logicalHeight = canvas.height / dpr;

                        // Clear previous signature
                        clearSignature();

                        // Calculate aspect ratio to fit image within logical canvas dimensions
                        const hRatio = logicalWidth / img.width;
                        const vRatio = logicalHeight / img.height;
                        const ratio = Math.min(hRatio, vRatio);
                        const centerShift_x = (logicalWidth - img.width * ratio) / 2;
                        const centerShift_y = (logicalHeight - img.height * ratio) / 2;

                        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, logicalWidth, logicalHeight);
                        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, img.width, img.height,
                            centerShift_x, centerShift_y, img.width * ratio, img.height * ratio);

                        // Notify signaturePad it isn't empty (since we bypassed its event handlers)
                        signaturePad._isEmpty = false;
                    }
                    img.src = e.target.result;
                }
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }
            // Reset input so the same file can be uploaded again if cleared
            input.value = '';
        }

        // --- INLINE VALIDATION ERROR BANNER ---
        function showStepError(missingFields) {
            let banner = document.getElementById('stepErrorBanner');
            if (!banner) return;
            let html = `<div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle text-red-500 mt-0.5 text-lg"></i>
                <div>
                    <p class="font-bold text-red-700 text-sm mb-1">Please complete the following required fields:</p>
                    <ul class="list-disc list-inside space-y-0.5">`;
            missingFields.forEach(f => {
                html += `<li class="text-red-600 text-sm">${f}</li>`;
            });
            html += `</ul></div></div>`;
            banner.innerHTML = html;
            banner.classList.remove('hidden');
            banner.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
        }

        function clearStepError() {
            const banner = document.getElementById('stepErrorBanner');
            if (banner) banner.classList.add('hidden');
        }

        // Wizard Logic
        function updateSteps() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.form-card').forEach(card => {
                card.classList.remove('active');
            });
            document.querySelector(`.form-card[data-step="${currentStep}"]`).classList.add('active');

            document.querySelectorAll('.step-item').forEach(dot => {
                const stepIdx = parseInt(dot.dataset.step);
                dot.classList.remove('active', 'completed');
                if (stepIdx === currentStep) dot.classList.add('active');
                if (stepIdx < currentStep) dot.classList.add('completed');
            });

            // Buttons
            // Navigation Buttons visibility logic
            const prevBtn = document.getElementById('prevBtn');
            const nextBtn = document.getElementById('nextBtn');
            const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');

            prevBtn.classList.toggle('hidden', currentStep === 1);

            if (currentStep === totalSteps) {
                nextBtn.classList.add('hidden');
                submitBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
            } else {
                nextBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                submitBtn.classList.add('hidden');
            }

            if (currentStep === 6 && !signaturePad) {
                setTimeout(initSignaturePad, 100);
            }
        }

        function validateCurrentStep() {
            const card = document.querySelector(`.form-card[data-step="${currentStep}"]`);
            const requiredFields = card.querySelectorAll('input[required], select[required], textarea[required]');
            const missing = [];

            requiredFields.forEach(field => {
                let isMissing = false;

                if (field.type === 'radio') {
                    const name = field.name;
                    const group = card.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${name}"]`);
                    const checked = Array.from(group).find(r => r.checked);
                    if (!checked) isMissing = true;
                } else if (field.type === 'checkbox') {
                    if (!field.checked) isMissing = true;
                } else if (field.type === 'file') {
                    // Check if file is selected OR if we already have an upload URL in a hidden field
                    if (field.name === 'payment_receipt') {
                        // Multi-file receipt: valid when at least one URL has been uploaded
                        const urlsRaw = document.getElementById('payment_receipt_urls')?.value || '';
                        let uploadedCount = 0;
                        try { uploadedCount = JSON.parse(urlsRaw).length; } catch (_) { }
                        if (uploadedCount === 0) isMissing = true;
                    } else {
                        const hiddenId = field.name === 'passport_photo' ? 'passport_photo_url' :
                            field.name === 'id_document' ? 'nin_document_url' : null;
                        const hiddenVal = hiddenId ? document.getElementById(hiddenId)?.value : null;
                        if (!field.files.length && !hiddenVal) isMissing = true;
                    }
                } else {
                    if (!field.value.trim()) isMissing = true;
                }

                if (isMissing) {
                    field.classList.add('border-red-500', 'ring-1', 'ring-red-400');
                    // Label discovery
                    let labelText = field.getAttribute('placeholder') || field.name || 'Unknown field';
                    const label = card.querySelector(`label[for="${field.id}"]`) ||
                        field.closest('div')?.querySelector('label');
                    if (label) labelText = label.textContent.trim().replace('*', '').trim();
                    if (!missing.includes(labelText)) missing.push(labelText);
                } else {
                    field.classList.remove('border-red-500', 'ring-1', 'ring-red-400');
                }
            });

            return missing;
        }

        function changeStep(delta) {
            // Validation on forward move
            if (delta > 0) {
                const missing = validateCurrentStep();
                if (missing.length > 0) {
                    showStepError(missing);
                    return;
                } else {
                    clearStepError();
                }
            }

            currentStep += delta;
            if (currentStep < 1) currentStep = 1;
            if (currentStep > totalSteps) currentStep = totalSteps;
            updateSteps();
            window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
        }

        // File Selection, Preview & Immediate Upload
        async function handleFileSelection(input, previewId, fileType, statusId) {
            if (!input.files || !input.files[0]) return;

            const file = input.files[0];
            const allowedMimeTypes = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp', 'application/pdf'];
            const ext = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
            const allowedExts = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp', 'pdf'];

            if (!allowedMimeTypes.includes(file.type) && !allowedExts.includes(ext)) {
                alert("Unsupported file format detected. Please provide your documents as high-quality Images (JPG, PNG) or PDF files for processing.");
                input.value = ''; // Reset the input
                return;
            }

            // 1. Locally Preview if it's an image
            if (previewId) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (e) {
                    const container = document.getElementById(previewId);
                    const img = container.querySelector('img');
                    img.src = e.target.result;
                    img.classList.remove('hidden');
                    const userIcon = container.querySelector('.fa-user');
                    if (userIcon) userIcon.classList.add('hidden');
                }
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }

            // 2. Background Upload to Storage
            const statusEl = document.getElementById(statusId);
            if (statusEl) {
                statusEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                statusEl.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin text-gold"></i>';
            }

            activeUploads++;

            try {
                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('file', input.files[0]);
                formData.append('file_type', fileType);

                const response = await fetch('/api/subscriptions/upload-file', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    body: formData
                });

                if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Upload failed");
                const result = await response.json();

                if (result.status === 'success') {
                    // Update hidden field with the URL
                    const urlInputId = fileType === 'id_document' ? 'nin_document_url' :
                        fileType === 'passport' ? 'passport_photo_url' :
                            'payment_receipt_url';
                    document.getElementById(urlInputId).value = result.url;

                    if (statusEl) {
                        statusEl.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check-circle text-green-500"></i>';
                    }
                } else {
                    throw new Error(result.message || "Upload failed");
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error("Upload error:", error);
                if (statusEl) {
                    statusEl.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle text-red-500" title="Upload failed. Please try again."></i>';
                }
                alert("Document upload failed. Please try selecting the file again.");
            } finally {
                activeUploads = Math.max(0, activeUploads - 1);
            }
        }

        // â”€â”€ Multi-file receipt upload â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        // Stores uploaded URLs in an array; serialises to the hidden field as JSON.
        const receiptUploadedUrls = [];

        function refreshReceiptHidden() {
            document.getElementById('payment_receipt_urls').value =
                receiptUploadedUrls.length ? JSON.stringify(receiptUploadedUrls) : '';
        }

        function handleReceiptDrop(event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            document.getElementById('receiptDropZone').classList.remove('border-gold');
            handleReceiptFiles(event.dataTransfer.files);
        }

        async function handleReceiptFiles(fileList) {
            if (!fileList || fileList.length === 0) return;

            const allowedMime = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp', 'application/pdf'];
            const allowedExt = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp', 'pdf'];
            const list = document.getElementById('receiptFileList');
            list.classList.remove('hidden');

            const uploads = Array.from(fileList).map(async (file) => {
                const ext = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
                // Create a list row immediately so user sees progress
                const li = document.createElement('li');
                li.className = 'flex items-center justify-between gap-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm';
                li.innerHTML = `
                    <span class="truncate flex-1 text-gray-700" title="${file.name}">
                        <i class="fas fa-file mr-1 text-gray-400"></i>${file.name}
                        <span class="text-gray-400 text-xs">(${(file.size / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB)</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="status-icon text-gold"><i class="fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin"></i></span>`;
                list.appendChild(li);
                const statusEl = li.querySelector('.status-icon');

                // Validate type
                if (!allowedMime.includes(file.type) && !allowedExt.includes(ext)) {
                    statusEl.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-times-circle text-red-500" title="Unsupported format"></i>';
                    return;
                }

                activeUploads++;
                try {
                    const fd = new FormData();
                    fd.append('file', file);
                    fd.append('file_type', 'receipt');
                    const res = await fetch('/api/subscriptions/upload-file', { method: 'POST', body: fd });
                    const data = await res.json();
                    if (!res.ok || data.status !== 'success') throw new Error(data.message || 'Upload failed');
                    receiptUploadedUrls.push(data.url);
                    refreshReceiptHidden();
                    statusEl.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check-circle text-green-500"></i>';
                } catch (err) {
                    statusEl.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle text-red-500" title="Upload failed â€” please retry"></i>';
                    console.error('Receipt upload error:', err);
                } finally {
                    activeUploads = Math.max(0, activeUploads - 1);
                }
            });

            await Promise.allSettled(uploads);
        }

        // Searchable Occupations
        const occupations = [
            'Academic', 'Accountant', 'Account Manager', 'Actuary', 'Acupuncturist', 'Actor/Actress', 'Administrative Assistant', 'Administrator', 'Advocate', 'Aeronautical Engineer',
            'Agronomist', 'Air Traffic Controller', 'Aircraft Mechanic', 'Ambassador', 'Analyst', 'Anesthesiologist', 'Animal Breeder', 'Animator', 'Anthropologist', 'Appraiser',
            'Architect', 'Archivist', 'Artist', 'Art Director', 'Asset Manager', 'Astronomer', 'Athlete', 'Attorney', 'Auctioneer', 'Auditor', 'Author', 'Auto Mechanic', 'Aviation Consultant',
            'Bailiff', 'Baker', 'Banker', 'Barber', 'Barrister', 'Bartender', 'Bellhop', 'Biochemist', 'Biologist', 'Biomedical Engineer', 'Biotechnologist', 'Blacksmith', 'Block Molder',
            'Blockchain Developer', 'Bodyguard', 'Bookkeeper', 'Botanist', 'Brand Ambassador', 'Bricklayer', 'Broadcaster', 'Broker', 'Budget Analyst', 'Building Contractor',
            'Business Analyst', 'Businessman/Woman', 'Business Consultant', 'Business Developer', 'Butcher', 'Buyer',
            'Cabinet Maker', 'Call Center Agent', 'Camera Operator', 'Captain', 'Carpenter', 'Cartographer', 'Cashier', 'Caterer', 'Cell Biologist', 'Ceramic Artist', 'Chartered Accountant',

            'Valuer', 'Vendor', 'Veterinary Doctor', 'Video Editor', 'Videographer', 'Virtual Assistant', 'Visual Artist', 'Vocational Instructor', 'Waiter/Waitress', 'Warehouse Manager',

            'X-ray Technician',
