            'Zoologist'
        ];

        const searchInput = document.getElementById('occupationSearch');
        const listContainer = document.getElementById('occupationList');

        searchInput.addEventListener('input', function () {
            const val = this.value.toLowerCase();
            listContainer.innerHTML = '';
            if (!val) {
                listContainer.style.display = 'none';
                return;
            }
            const matches = occupations.filter(o => o.toLowerCase().includes(val));
            matches.forEach(m => {
                const div = document.createElement('div');
                div.className = 'autocomplete-item';
                div.textContent = m;
                div.onclick = () => {
                    searchInput.value = m;
                    listContainer.style.display = 'none';
                };
                listContainer.appendChild(div);
            });
            listContainer.style.display = matches.length ? 'block' : 'none';
        });

        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (!searchInput.contains(e.target)) listContainer.style.display = 'none';
            if (repSearch && !repSearch.contains(e.target)) repList.style.display = 'none';
        });

        // Searchable Sales Representatives
        let allReps = [];
        const repSearch = document.getElementById('salesRepSearch');
        const repList = document.getElementById('salesRepList');
        const hiddenRepId = document.getElementById('sales_rep_id');

        async function fetchReps() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/sales-reps/public/active');
                if (res.ok) allReps = await res.json();
            } catch (e) { console.error("Failed to load reps", e); }
        }

        if (repSearch) {
            fetchReps();
            repSearch.addEventListener('input', function () {
                const val = this.value.toLowerCase();
                repList.innerHTML = '';
                // Clear ID if user starts typing something new (they need to re-select)
                hiddenRepId.value = '';

                if (!val) {
                    repList.style.display = 'none';
                    return;
                }
                const matches = allReps.filter(r =>
                    r.name.toLowerCase().includes(val) ||
                    (r.phone && r.phone.includes(val))
                );
                matches.forEach(r => {
                    const div = document.createElement('div');
                    div.className = 'autocomplete-item group transition-all';
                    div.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="flex flex-col">
                            <span class="font-bold text-gray-900 group-hover:text-gold">${r.name}</span>
                            <span class="text-[10px] text-muted uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1">
                                <i class="fas fa-phone-alt text-[8px]"></i> ${r.phone || 'No phone recorded'}
                            </span>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    div.onclick = () => {
                        repSearch.value = r.name;
                        hiddenRepId.value = r.id;
                        repList.style.display = 'none';
                    };
                    repList.appendChild(div);
                });
                repList.style.display = matches.length ? 'block' : 'none';
            });
        }

        // Other Property Toggle
        function toggleOtherProperty(select) {
            const container = document.getElementById('otherPropertyContainer');
            const input = document.getElementById('otherPropertyName');
            if (select.value === 'Other') {
                container.classList.remove('hidden');
                input.required = true;
            } else {
                container.classList.add('hidden');
                input.required = false;
            }
        }

        // Other Plot Size Toggle
        function toggleOtherPlotSize(select) {
            const input = document.getElementById('otherPlotSize');
            if (select.value === 'Other') {
                input.classList.remove('hidden');
                input.required = true;
            } else {
                input.classList.add('hidden');
                input.required = false;
            }
        }

        // Other Quantity Toggle
        function toggleOtherQuantity(radio) {
            const input = document.getElementById('otherQuantity');
            if (radio.value === 'Other') {
                input.disabled = false;
                input.required = true;
                input.focus();
            } else {
                input.disabled = true;
                input.required = false;
                input.value = '';
            }
        }

        // Other NOK Relationship Toggle
        function toggleOtherNok(radio) {
            const input = document.getElementById('otherNokRelationship');
            if (radio.value === 'Other') {
                input.disabled = false;
                input.required = true;
                input.focus();
            } else {
                input.disabled = true;
                input.required = false;
                input.value = '';
            }
        }

        // --- CO-OWNER MODAL LOGIC ---
        function handleOwnershipChange(isLoad = false) {
            const val = document.getElementById('ownershipSelect').value;
            if (val === 'joint') {
                if (!isLoad) {
                    document.getElementById('coOwnerModal').classList.remove('hidden');
                }
            } else {
                // Clear hidden fields when sole is selected
                document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_name').value = "";
                document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_address').value = "";
                document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_occupation').value = "";
                document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_phone').value = "";
                document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_email').value = "";
            }
        }

        function closeCoOwnerModal() {
            document.getElementById('coOwnerModal').classList.add('hidden');
            // If they closed it without saving, and fields are empty, revert to sole
            if (!document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_name').value) {
                document.getElementById('ownershipSelect').value = 'sole';
            }
        }

        function saveCoOwner() {
            const fields = [
                { id: 'modal_co_owner_name', label: 'Full Name', required: true },
                { id: 'modal_co_owner_address', label: 'Residential Address', required: true },
                { id: 'modal_co_owner_occupation', label: 'Occupation', required: true },
                { id: 'modal_co_owner_phone', label: 'Phone Number', required: true },
                { id: 'modal_co_owner_email', label: 'Email Address', required: true },
            ];

            const missing = [];
            fields.forEach(f => {
                const el = document.getElementById(f.id);
                if (f.required && !el.value.trim()) {
                    missing.push(f.label);
                    el.classList.add('border-red-500', 'ring-1', 'ring-red-400');
                } else {
                    el.classList.remove('border-red-500', 'ring-1', 'ring-red-400');
                }
            });

            if (missing.length > 0) {
                const banner = document.getElementById('coOwnerErrorBanner');
                banner.innerHTML = `<div class="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle text-red-500 mt-0.5"></i>
                    <div>
                        <p class="font-bold text-red-700 text-sm mb-1">Please fill in the following required fields:</p>
                        <ul class="list-disc list-inside">${missing.map(m => `<li class="text-red-600 text-sm">${m}</li>`).join('')}</ul>
                    </div>
                </div>`;
                banner.classList.remove('hidden');
                return;
            }

            document.getElementById('coOwnerErrorBanner').classList.add('hidden');

            const name = document.getElementById('modal_co_owner_name').value.trim();
            const addr = document.getElementById('modal_co_owner_address').value.trim();
            const occ = document.getElementById('modal_co_owner_occupation').value.trim();
            const phone = document.getElementById('modal_co_owner_phone').value.trim();
            const email = document.getElementById('modal_co_owner_email').value.trim();

            // Save to hidden form fields
            document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_name').value = name;
            document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_address').value = addr;
            document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_occupation').value = occ;
            document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_phone').value = phone;
            document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_email').value = email;

            document.getElementById('coOwnerModal').classList.add('hidden');

            // Optional: Show a subtle confirmation
            const btn = document.querySelector('button[onclick="saveCoOwner()"]');
            const oldTxt = btn.innerHTML;
            btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Saved!';
            btn.classList.replace('bg-gold', 'bg-green-500');
            setTimeout(() => {
                btn.innerHTML = oldTxt;
                btn.classList.replace('bg-green-500', 'bg-gold');
            }, 2000);
        }

        // --- AUTO-SAVE LOGIC ---
        const AUTOSAVE_KEY = 'ecPropertyFormState';

        function saveFormState() {
            const state = {};
            const inputs = form.querySelectorAll('input, select, textarea');
            inputs.forEach(input => {
                if (input.type === 'file' || input.type === 'hidden') return; // Skip files and raw hidden vars
                if (input.type === 'radio' || input.type === 'checkbox') {
                    if (input.checked) state[input.name || input.id] = input.value;
                } else {
                    if (input.name) state[input.name] = input.value;
                    else if (input.id) state[input.id] = input.value;
                }
            });
            localStorage.setItem(AUTOSAVE_KEY, JSON.stringify(state));
        }

        function loadFormState() {
            const savedString = localStorage.getItem(AUTOSAVE_KEY);
            if (!savedString) return;
            try {
                const state = JSON.parse(savedString);
                const inputs = form.querySelectorAll('input, select, textarea');
                inputs.forEach(input => {
                    if (input.type === 'file' || input.type === 'hidden') return;

                    const val = state[input.name] !== undefined ? state[input.name] : state[input.id];
                    if (val !== undefined && val !== "") {
                        if (input.type === 'radio' || input.type === 'checkbox') {
                            if (input.value === val) input.checked = true;
                        } else {
                            input.value = val;
                        }
                    }
                });

                // Re-trigger visual UI toggles based on loaded state
                const propSelect = document.getElementById('propertySelect');
                if (propSelect) toggleOtherProperty(propSelect);

                const plotSelect = document.getElementById('plotSizeSelect');
                if (plotSelect) toggleOtherPlotSize(plotSelect);

                const qRadios = document.getElementsByName('quantity');
                qRadios.forEach(r => { if (r.checked) toggleOtherQuantity(r); });

                handleOwnershipChange(true); // Pass true to prevent modal popup on load
            } catch (e) {
                console.error("Autosave load failed", e);
            }
        }

        form.addEventListener('input', saveFormState);
        form.addEventListener('change', saveFormState);
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            loadFormState();
            updateSteps(); // Ensure wizard is in the right state on load
        });
        form.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            clearStepError();
            document.getElementById('globalErrorBanner')?.classList.add('hidden');

            const goldBtn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
            const originalText = goldBtn.innerHTML;

            // 1. Enter Locked Loading State Immediately
            goldBtn.disabled = true;
            goldBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin mr-2"></i> Processing Application...';

            try {
                // 2. Wait for background uploads (Max 5s silenty, then ask)
                if (typeof activeUploads !== 'undefined' && activeUploads > 0) {
                    console.log("Waiting for background uploads...", activeUploads);
                    goldBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin mr-2"></i> Finishing Document Uploads...';

                    let pollCount = 0;
                    while (activeUploads > 0 && pollCount < 10) { // 5 seconds (10 * 500ms)
                        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500));
                        pollCount++;
                    }

                    if (activeUploads > 0) {
                        const proceed = confirm("Some documents are still uploading. Do you want to submit with currently uploaded files anyway?");
                        if (!proceed) {
                            goldBtn.disabled = false;
                            goldBtn.innerHTML = originalText;
                            return;
                        }
                    }
                    // Restore processing text for finalize step
                    goldBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin mr-2"></i> Finalizing Application...';
                }

                // 3. Document Validation & Preparation
                const formData = new FormData(form);
                const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());

                // Co-Owner check
                if (data.ownership_type === 'joint' && !document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_name').value) {
                    showStepError(["Co-Owner details (Joint ownership selected)"]);
                    currentStep = 5;
                    updateSteps();
                    throw new Error("Validation failed");
                }

                // Add UTMs and Attribution
                const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
                const utmKeys = ['utm_source', 'utm_medium', 'utm_campaign', 'utm_content', 'utm_term'];
                utmKeys.forEach(k => {
                    data[k] = urlParams.get(k) || localStorage.getItem(`ec_${k}`);
                });
                data.marketing_campaign_id = urlParams.get('mcid') || localStorage.getItem('mcid');

                // Merge multi-file receipt URLs into submission payload
                const _rawUrls = document.getElementById('payment_receipt_urls')?.value || '';
                if (_rawUrls) {
                    try {
                        const _urls = JSON.parse(_rawUrls);
                        data.payment_receipt_urls = _urls;
                        // Keep legacy single-URL field populated for backwards compat
                        if (_urls.length > 0) data.payment_receipt_url = _urls[0];
                    } catch (_) { }
                }

                // Handle Overrides
                if (data.property_name === 'Other') data.property_name = document.getElementById('otherPropertyName').value;
                if (data.plot_size === 'Other') data.plot_size = document.getElementById('otherPlotSize').value;
                if (data.quantity === 'Other') data.quantity = document.getElementById('otherQuantity').value;
                if (data.nok_relationship === 'Other') data.nok_relationship = document.getElementById('otherNokRelationship').value;

                // 4. Handle Signature
                if (typeof signaturePad !== 'undefined' && signaturePad && !signaturePad.isEmpty()) {
                    data.signature_data = signaturePad.toDataURL();
                } else {
                    showStepError(["Client Signature (Required)"]);
                    currentStep = 6;
                    updateSteps();
                    throw new Error("Validation failed");
                }

                // Check Consent
                if (!document.getElementById('consent').checked) {
                    showStepError(["Consent to terms (Required)"]);
                    throw new Error("Validation failed");
                }
                data.consent_given = true;

                // 4. API Submission
                const response = await fetch('/api/subscriptions/submit', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(data)
                });

                const result = await response.json();
                if (result.status === 'success') {
                    localStorage.removeItem(AUTOSAVE_KEY);
                    document.getElementById('successInvoiceNum').textContent = result.invoice_number;
                    document.getElementById('successModal').classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    throw new Error(result.message || "Unknown error occurred");
                }
            } catch (err) {
                if (err.message !== "Validation failed") {
                    console.error("Submission error:", err);
                    const banner = document.getElementById('globalErrorBanner');
                    const msg = document.getElementById('globalErrorMessage');
                    if (banner && msg) {
                        banner.classList.remove('hidden');
                        msg.textContent = "Oops! We encountered an issue. Please check your connection and try again.";
                        banner.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
                    }
                }
            } finally {
                goldBtn.disabled = false;
                goldBtn.innerHTML = originalText;
            }
        });

        // ===== INTRO â†’ FORM TRANSITION =====
        function startForm() {
            const intro = document.getElementById('introCard');
            const formSection = document.getElementById('formSection');

            intro.style.transition = 'opacity 0.4s ease, transform 0.4s ease';
            intro.style.opacity = '0';
            intro.style.transform = 'translateY(-10px)';

            setTimeout(() => {
                intro.classList.add('hidden');
                formSection.classList.remove('hidden');
                formSection.style.opacity = '0';
                formSection.style.transform = 'translateY(10px)';
                formSection.style.transition = 'opacity 0.4s ease, transform 0.4s ease';
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        formSection.style.opacity = '1';
                        formSection.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
                    });
                });
                window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
            }, 400);
        }
    </script>
</body>

</html>


================================================

                        <label class="flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer">
                            <input type="radio" name="quantity" value="4"
                                class="w-5 h-5 text-gold border-gray-300 focus:ring-gold"
                                onchange="toggleOtherQuantity(this)">
                            <span class="text-gray-700 font-medium text-lg">4</span>
                        </label>
                        <label class="flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer">
                            <input type="radio" name="quantity" value="Other"
                                class="w-5 h-5 text-gold border-gray-300 focus:ring-gold"
                                onchange="toggleOtherQuantity(this)">
                            <span class="text-gray-700 font-medium text-lg whitespace-nowrap">Other:</span>
                            <input type="number" id="otherQuantity" placeholder="..." disabled
                                class="flex-1 max-w-[200px] bg-transparent border-b border-gray-300 p-1 outline-none focus:border-gold disabled:opacity-50">
                        </label>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div
                    class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mt-8 p-6 bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200">
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2 text-gold">Deposit Amount (NGN) <span
                                class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                        <div class="relative">
                            <span class="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 font-bold text-gray-400">â‚¦</span>
                            <input type="number" name="deposit_amount" required
                                class="w-full p-3 pl-8 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gold outline-none font-bold"
                                placeholder="0.00">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2">Payment Date <span
                                class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                        <input type="date" name="payment_date" required
                            class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gold outline-none">
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2">Payment Duration <span class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                        <select name="payment_duration" required
                            class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gold outline-none">
                            <option value="Outright">Outright Payment</option>
                            <option value="3 Months">3 Months Installment</option>
                            <option value="6 Months">6 Months Installment</option>
                            <option value="12 Months">12 Months Installment</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="mt-6">
                    <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2">Upload Payment Receipt <span class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                    <div class="relative group">
                        <input type="file" name="payment_receipt"
                            accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp,application/pdf" required
                            onchange="handleFileSelection(this, null, 'receipt', 'receiptStatus')"
                            class="w-full p-2.5 text-sm text-gray-500 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gold outline-none">
                        <div id="receiptStatus" class="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 hidden">
                            <i class="fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin text-gold"></i>
                        </div>
                        <input type="hidden" name="payment_receipt_url" id="payment_receipt_url">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Step 6: Review & Sign -->
            <div class="form-card" data-step="6">
                <h2 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-2">Finalize & Sign</h2>
                <p class="text-muted mb-8">Please review all information and provide your signature.</p>

                <!-- Terms Content -->
                <div
                    class="bg-gray-50 p-6 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 mb-8 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto text-sm text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">DECLARATION & CONSENT</h3>
                    By checking the box below, I confirm that I have read, understand, and consent to all of the
                    following Eximp & Cloves Infrastructure limited documents:
                    <a href="https://eximps-cloves.com/terms" target="_blank"
                        class="text-gold font-bold underline">Terms and Conditions</a>,
                    <a href="https://eximps-cloves.com/terms" target="_blank"
                        class="text-gold font-bold underline">Payment Protection Promise</a> and
                    <a href="https://eximps-cloves.com/refund" target="_blank"
                        class="text-gold font-bold underline">Refund Policies</a>.
                    I accept full responsibility for all legal implications and interpretations of this agreement. I
                    understand that this subscription form becomes binding on all parties immediately upon the company's
                    receipt of my payment.
                </div>

                <div class="flex items-start gap-3 mb-8">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="consent" required
                        class="mt-1 w-5 h-5 rounded border-gray-300 text-gold focus:ring-gold">
                    <label for="consent" class="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">I Agree to the Terms & Conditions and
                        understand all legal implications.</label>
                </div>

                <!-- Signature Pad -->
                <div class="mb-6">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                        <label class="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">Client Signature <span
                                class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                        <div class="flex gap-4 items-center">
                            <label
                                class="text-xs text-blue-600 font-bold hover:underline cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1">
                                <i class="fas fa-upload"></i> UPLOAD IMAGE
                                <input type="file" accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp" class="hidden"
                                    onchange="uploadSignatureImage(this)">
                            </label>
                            <span class="text-gray-300">|</span>
                            <button type="button" onclick="clearSignature()"
                                class="text-xs text-red-500 font-bold hover:underline">CLEAR</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <canvas id="signature-pad" class="sig-pad w-full h-48"></canvas>
                    <p class="text-center text-[10px] text-muted mt-2 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold">Sign or
                        Upload Inside the Box Above</p>
                </div>

                <div class="mt-6 relative" id="salesRepSearchGroup">
                    <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2">Referring Representative / Realtor
                        (Optional)</label>
                    <div class="relative">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-tie absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-muted"></i>
                        <input type="text" id="salesRepSearch" name="sales_rep_name" autocomplete="off"
                            class="w-full p-3 pl-12 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gold outline-none"
                            placeholder="Search by name or phone number...">
                        <input type="hidden" name="sales_rep_id" id="sales_rep_id" value="{{ rep.id if rep else '' }}">
                    </div>
                    <div id="salesRepList" class="autocomplete-list shadow-2xl border-gold/20"></div>
                    {% if rep %}
                    <p class="text-[10px] text-green-600 font-bold mt-1 uppercase tracking-wider"><i
                            class="fas fa-link mr-1"></i> Attribution Linked to {{ rep.name }}</p>
                    {% endif %}
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Navigation -->
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center pt-8 border-top border-gray-100">
                <button type="button" id="prevBtn" onclick="changeStep(-1)" class="nav-button hidden">
                    <i class="fas fa-arrow-left mr-2"></i> Previous
                </button>
                <div class="flex-1"></div>
                <button type="button" id="nextBtn" onclick="changeStep(1)" class="gold-button">
                    Next Step <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                </button>
                <button type="submit" id="submitBtn" class="gold-button hidden">
                    Complete Subscription <i class="fas fa-check-circle ml-2"></i>
                </button>
            </div>

        </form>
    </main>

    <div id="successModal" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-6 hidden">

            <div class="w-20 h-20 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-6">

    <!-- CO-OWNER MODAL -->
    <div id="coOwnerModal"
        class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 hidden">
        <div class="bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 max-w-lg w-full shadow-2xl relative max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
            <button type="button" onclick="closeCoOwnerModal()"
                class="absolute top-4 right-4 w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-500">
                <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
            </button>
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6 border-b border-gray-100 pb-4">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gold-light/30 flex items-center justify-center text-gold">
                    <i class="fas fa-users"></i>

            <!-- Inline error banner for co-owner modal -->
            <div id="coOwnerErrorBanner"
                class="hidden bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-xl p-3 mb-4 text-red-700 text-sm"></div>

            <div class="space-y-4">
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1">Full Name <span class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                    <input type="text" id="modal_co_owner_name" required
                        class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:border-gold outline-none"
                        placeholder="Full name">
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1">Residential Address <span class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                    <input type="text" id="modal_co_owner_address" required
                        class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:border-gold outline-none"
                        placeholder="Full home address">
                </div>

                    <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1">Occupation</label>

                        class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:border-gold outline-none"
                        placeholder="e.g. Engineer">

                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1">Phone Number <span class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                        <input type="tel" id="modal_co_owner_phone" required
                            class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:border-gold outline-none"
                            placeholder="+234...">
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1">Email Address</label>
                        <input type="email" id="modal_co_owner_email" required
                            class="w-full p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 focus:border-gold outline-none"
                            placeholder="email@example.com">

                        Details</button>
                </div>

    </div>

    <script>
        let currentStep = 1;
        const totalSteps = 6;
        let activeUploads = 0;
        const form = document.getElementById('subscriptionForm');
        let signaturePad;

        // Initialize Signature Pad
        function initSignaturePad() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('signature-pad');
            const ratio = Math.max(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 1);
            canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth * ratio;
            canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight * ratio;
            canvas.getContext("2d").scale(ratio, ratio);
            signaturePad = new SignaturePad(canvas, {
                penColor: "rgb(0, 0, 0)"
            });
        }

        function clearSignature() { if (signaturePad) signaturePad.clear(); }

        // Upload Signature Image to Canvas
        function uploadSignatureImage(input) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                const file = input.files[0];
                const allowedMimeTypes = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp'];
                const ext = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
                const allowedExts = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp'];

                if (!allowedMimeTypes.includes(file.type) && !allowedExts.includes(ext)) {
                    alert("Unsupported signature format. Please upload your signature as a clear Image (JPG, PNG).");
                    input.value = '';
                    return;
                }
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (e) {
                    const img = new Image();
                    img.onload = function () {
                        const canvas = document.getElementById('signature-pad');
                        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

                        // Clear previous signature
                        clearSignature();

                        // Calculate aspect ratio to fit image beautifully
                        const hRatio = canvas.width / img.width;
                        const vRatio = canvas.height / img.height;
                        const ratio = Math.min(hRatio, vRatio);
                        const centerShift_x = (canvas.width - img.width * ratio) / 2;
                        const centerShift_y = (canvas.height - img.height * ratio) / 2;

                        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height); // Extra clear
                        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, img.width, img.height,
                            centerShift_x, centerShift_y, img.width * ratio, img.height * ratio);

                        // Notify signaturePad it isn't empty (since we bypassed its event handlers)
                        signaturePad._isEmpty = false;
                    }
                    img.src = e.target.result;
                }
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }
            // Reset input so the same file can be uploaded again if cleared
            input.value = '';
        }

        // --- INLINE VALIDATION ERROR BANNER ---
        function showStepError(missingFields) {
            let banner = document.getElementById('stepErrorBanner');
            if (!banner) return;
            let html = `<div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle text-red-500 mt-0.5 text-lg"></i>
                <div>
                    <p class="font-bold text-red-700 text-sm mb-1">Please complete the following required fields:</p>
                    <ul class="list-disc list-inside space-y-0.5">`;
            missingFields.forEach(f => {
                html += `<li class="text-red-600 text-sm">${f}</li>`;
            });
            html += `</ul></div></div>`;
            banner.innerHTML = html;
            banner.classList.remove('hidden');
            banner.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
        }

        function clearStepError() {
            const banner = document.getElementById('stepErrorBanner');
            if (banner) banner.classList.add('hidden');
        }

        // Wizard Logic
        function updateSteps() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.form-card').forEach(card => {
                card.classList.remove('active');
            });
            document.querySelector(`.form-card[data-step="${currentStep}"]`).classList.add('active');

            document.querySelectorAll('.step-item').forEach(dot => {
                const stepIdx = parseInt(dot.dataset.step);
                dot.classList.remove('active', 'completed');
                if (stepIdx === currentStep) dot.classList.add('active');
                if (stepIdx < currentStep) dot.classList.add('completed');
            });

            // Buttons
            // Navigation Buttons visibility logic
            const prevBtn = document.getElementById('prevBtn');
            const nextBtn = document.getElementById('nextBtn');
            const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');

            prevBtn.classList.toggle('hidden', currentStep === 1);

            if (currentStep === totalSteps) {
                nextBtn.classList.add('hidden');
                submitBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
            } else {
                nextBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
                submitBtn.classList.add('hidden');
            }

            if (currentStep === 6 && !signaturePad) {
                setTimeout(initSignaturePad, 100);
            }
        }

        function validateCurrentStep() {
            const card = document.querySelector(`.form-card[data-step="${currentStep}"]`);
            const requiredFields = card.querySelectorAll('input[required], select[required], textarea[required]');
            const missing = [];

            requiredFields.forEach(field => {
                let isMissing = false;

                if (field.type === 'radio') {
                    const name = field.name;
                    const group = card.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${name}"]`);
                    const checked = Array.from(group).find(r => r.checked);
                    if (!checked) isMissing = true;
                } else if (field.type === 'checkbox') {
                    if (!field.checked) isMissing = true;
                } else if (field.type === 'file') {
                    // Check if file is selected OR if we already have an upload URL in a hidden field
                    const hiddenId = field.name === 'payment_receipt' ? 'payment_receipt_url' :
                                   field.name === 'passport_photo' ? 'passport_photo_url' :
                                   field.name === 'id_document' ? 'nin_document_url' : null;
                    const hiddenVal = hiddenId ? document.getElementById(hiddenId)?.value : null;

                    if (!field.files.length && !hiddenVal) isMissing = true;
                } else {
                    if (!field.value.trim()) isMissing = true;
                }

                if (isMissing) {
                    field.classList.add('border-red-500', 'ring-1', 'ring-red-400');
                    // Label discovery
                    let labelText = field.getAttribute('placeholder') || field.name || 'Unknown field';
                    const label = card.querySelector(`label[for="${field.id}"]`) || 
                                 field.closest('div')?.querySelector('label');
                    if (label) labelText = label.textContent.trim().replace('*', '').trim();
                    if (!missing.includes(labelText)) missing.push(labelText);
                } else {
                    field.classList.remove('border-red-500', 'ring-1', 'ring-red-400');
                }
            });

            return missing;
        }

        function changeStep(delta) {
            // Validation on forward move
            if (delta > 0) {
                const missing = validateCurrentStep();
                if (missing.length > 0) {
                    showStepError(missing);
                    return;
                } else {
                    clearStepError();
                }
            }

            currentStep += delta;
            if (currentStep < 1) currentStep = 1;
            if (currentStep > totalSteps) currentStep = totalSteps;
            updateSteps();
            window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
        }

        // File Selection, Preview & Immediate Upload
        async function handleFileSelection(input, previewId, fileType, statusId) {
            if (!input.files || !input.files[0]) return;

            const file = input.files[0];
            const allowedMimeTypes = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp', 'application/pdf'];
            const ext = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
            const allowedExts = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp', 'pdf'];

            if (!allowedMimeTypes.includes(file.type) && !allowedExts.includes(ext)) {
                alert("Unsupported file format detected. Please provide your documents as high-quality Images (JPG, PNG) or PDF files for processing.");
                input.value = ''; // Reset the input
                return;
            }

            // 1. Locally Preview if it's an image
            if (previewId) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (e) {
                    const container = document.getElementById(previewId);
                    const img = container.querySelector('img');
                    img.src = e.target.result;
                    img.classList.remove('hidden');
                    const userIcon = container.querySelector('.fa-user');
                    if (userIcon) userIcon.classList.add('hidden');
                }
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }

            // 2. Background Upload to Storage
            const statusEl = document.getElementById(statusId);
            if (statusEl) {
                statusEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                statusEl.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin text-gold"></i>';
            }

            activeUploads++;

            try {
                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('file', input.files[0]);
                formData.append('file_type', fileType);

                const response = await fetch('/api/subscriptions/upload-file', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    body: formData
                });

                if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Upload failed");
                const result = await response.json();

                if (result.status === 'success') {
                    // Update hidden field with the URL
                    const urlInputId = fileType === 'id_document' ? 'nin_document_url' :
                        fileType === 'passport' ? 'passport_photo_url' :
                            'payment_receipt_url';
                    document.getElementById(urlInputId).value = result.url;

                    if (statusEl) {
                        statusEl.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check-circle text-green-500"></i>';
                    }
                } else {
                    throw new Error(result.message || "Upload failed");
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error("Upload error:", error);
                if (statusEl) {
                    statusEl.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle text-red-500" title="Upload failed. Please try again."></i>';
                }
                alert("Document upload failed. Please try selecting the file again.");
            } finally {
                activeUploads = Math.max(0, activeUploads - 1);
            }
        }

        // Searchable Occupations
        const occupations = [
            'Academic', 'Accountant', 'Account Manager', 'Actuary', 'Acupuncturist', 'Actor/Actress', 'Administrative Assistant', 'Administrator', 'Advocate', 'Aeronautical Engineer', 
            'Agronomist', 'Air Traffic Controller', 'Aircraft Mechanic', 'Ambassador', 'Analyst', 'Anesthesiologist', 'Animal Breeder', 'Animator', 'Anthropologist', 'Appraiser', 
            'Architect', 'Archivist', 'Artist', 'Art Director', 'Asset Manager', 'Astronomer', 'Athlete', 'Attorney', 'Auctioneer', 'Auditor', 'Author', 'Auto Mechanic', 'Aviation Consultant',
            'Bailiff', 'Baker', 'Banker', 'Barber', 'Barrister', 'Bartender', 'Bellhop', 'Biochemist', 'Biologist', 'Biomedical Engineer', 'Biotechnologist', 'Blacksmith', 'Block Molder', 
            'Blockchain Developer', 'Bodyguard', 'Bookkeeper', 'Botanist', 'Brand Ambassador', 'Bricklayer', 'Broadcaster', 'Broker', 'Budget Analyst', 'Building Contractor', 
            'Business Analyst', 'Businessman/Woman', 'Business Consultant', 'Business Developer', 'Butcher', 'Buyer',
            'Cabinet Maker', 'Call Center Agent', 'Camera Operator', 'Captain', 'Carpenter', 'Cartographer', 'Cashier', 'Caterer', 'Cell Biologist', 'Ceramic Artist', 'Chartered Accountant', 
            'Chauffeur', 'Chef', 'Chemical Engineer', 'Chemist', 'Chief Executive Officer', 'Chief Financial Officer', 'Chief Operating Officer', 'Chiropractor', 'Cinematographer', 
            'Civil Engineer', 'Civil Servant', 'Clergy', 'Clerk', 'Clinical Psychologist', 'Coach', 'Coast Guard', 'Content Creator', 'Cobbler', 'Comedian', 'Commercial Pilot', 
            'Communications Specialist', 'Community Manager', 'Compliance Officer', 'Computer Programmer', 'Concierge', 'Constructor', 'Consultant', 'Content Writer', 'Contractor', 
            'Copywriter', 'Corporate Trainer', 'Cosmetologist', 'Counselor', 'Courier', 'Court Registrar', 'Craftsman', 'Creative Director', 'Credit Analyst', 'Customer Service Rep', 'Cyber Security Analyst',
            'Data Analyst', 'Data Scientist', 'Database Administrator', 'Dean', 'Debt Collector', 'Decorator', 'Delivery Driver', 'Dentist', 'Dermatologist', 'Designer', 'Detective', 
            'Developer', 'Dietitian', 'Digital Marketer', 'Diplomat', 'Director', 'Dispatcher', 'District Manager', 'Diver', 'Doctor', 'Draftsman', 'Driver', 'Dry Cleaner',
            'Ecologist', 'Economist', 'Editor', 'Education Consultant', 'Electrician', 'Electrical Engineer', 'Electronics Technician', 'Elementary Teacher', 'Embalmer', 'Emergency Medical Technician',

            'Fabricator', 'Factory Worker', 'Farmer', 'Farm Manager', 'Fashion Designer', 'Fashion Consultant', 'Film Director', 'Film Maker', 'Finance Manager', 'Financial Advisor', 
            'Financial Analyst', 'Firefighter', 'Fisherman', 'Fitness Trainer', 'Flight Attendant', 'Florist', 'Food Scientist', 'Forensic Scientist', 'Forester', 'Forklift Operator', 
            'Freight Forwarder', 'Full Stack Developer', 'Funeral Director',
            'Gardener', 'Gas Fitter', 'Geologist', 'Geophysicist', 'Glazier', 'General Contractor', 'General Manager', 'Goldsmith', 'Graphic Designer', 'Green Grocer', 'Guide', 'Guitarist',
            'Haberdasher', 'Hairdresser', 'Hairstylist', 'Health Consultant', 'Health Inspector', 'Heavy Equipment Operator', 'Historian', 'Home Maker', 'Horticulturist', 'Hospital Administrator', 
            'Hotelier', 'Hotel Manager', 'Housekeeper', 'Human Resources Manager', 'HVAC Technician', 'Hydrogeologist',
            'Illustrator', 'Immigration Officer', 'Importer', 'Industrial Designer', 'Industrial Engineer', 'Information Officer', 'Insurance Agent', 'Insurance Broker', 'Interior Decorator', 
            'Interior Designer', 'Interpreter', 'Inventor', 'Inventory Controller', 'Investment Analyst', 'Investment Banker', 'IT Consultant', 'IT Manager', 'IT Specialist',

            'Tailor', 'Tax Consultant', 'Taxi Driver', 'Teacher', 'Technical Writer', 'Technician', 'Telemarketer', 'Teller', 'Tiler', 'Tourism Consultant', 'Tour Guide', 'Town Planner', 
            'Trader', 'Traffic Warden', 'Trainer', 'Translator', 'Travel Agent', 'Treasurer', 'Truck Driver', 'Tutor', 'Typist',
            'UI/UX Designer', 'Underwriter', 'Upholsterer', 'Urban Planner', 'Urologist',
            'Valuer', 'Vendor', 'Veterinary Doctor', 'Video Editor', 'Videographer', 'Virtual Assistant', 'Visual Artist', 'Vocational Instructor', 'Waiter/Waitress', 'Warehouse Manager', 
            'Web Designer', 'Web Developer', 'Welder', 'Wholesaler', 'Woodworker', 'Writer',
            'X-ray Technician',
            'Yard Manager', 'Yoga Instructor', 'Youth Worker',
            'Zoologist'
        ];

        const searchInput = document.getElementById('occupationSearch');
        const listContainer = document.getElementById('occupationList');

        searchInput.addEventListener('input', function () {
            const val = this.value.toLowerCase();
            listContainer.innerHTML = '';
            if (!val) {
                listContainer.style.display = 'none';
                return;
            }
            const matches = occupations.filter(o => o.toLowerCase().includes(val));
            matches.forEach(m => {
                const div = document.createElement('div');
                div.className = 'autocomplete-item';
                div.textContent = m;
                div.onclick = () => {
                    searchInput.value = m;
                    listContainer.style.display = 'none';
                };
                listContainer.appendChild(div);
            });
            listContainer.style.display = matches.length ? 'block' : 'none';
        });

        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (!searchInput.contains(e.target)) listContainer.style.display = 'none';
            if (repSearch && !repSearch.contains(e.target)) repList.style.display = 'none';
        });

        // Searchable Sales Representatives
        let allReps = [];
        const repSearch = document.getElementById('salesRepSearch');
        const repList = document.getElementById('salesRepList');
        const hiddenRepId = document.getElementById('sales_rep_id');

        async function fetchReps() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch('/api/sales-reps/public/active');
                if (res.ok) allReps = await res.json();
            } catch (e) { console.error("Failed to load reps", e); }
        }

        if (repSearch) {
            fetchReps();
            repSearch.addEventListener('input', function () {
                const val = this.value.toLowerCase();
                repList.innerHTML = '';
                // Clear ID if user starts typing something new (they need to re-select)
                hiddenRepId.value = '';

                if (!val) {
                    repList.style.display = 'none';
                    return;
                }
                const matches = allReps.filter(r =>
                    r.name.toLowerCase().includes(val) ||
                    (r.phone && r.phone.includes(val))
                );
                matches.forEach(r => {
                    const div = document.createElement('div');
                    div.className = 'autocomplete-item group transition-all';
                    div.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="flex flex-col">
                            <span class="font-bold text-gray-900 group-hover:text-gold">${r.name}</span>
                            <span class="text-[10px] text-muted uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1">
                                <i class="fas fa-phone-alt text-[8px]"></i> ${r.phone || 'No phone recorded'}
                            </span>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    div.onclick = () => {
                        repSearch.value = r.name;
                        hiddenRepId.value = r.id;
                        repList.style.display = 'none';
                    };
                    repList.appendChild(div);
                });
                repList.style.display = matches.length ? 'block' : 'none';
            });
        }

        // Other Property Toggle
        function toggleOtherProperty(select) {
            const container = document.getElementById('otherPropertyContainer');
            const input = document.getElementById('otherPropertyName');
            if (select.value === 'Other') {
                container.classList.remove('hidden');
                input.required = true;
            } else {
                container.classList.add('hidden');
                input.required = false;
            }
        }

        // Other Plot Size Toggle
        function toggleOtherPlotSize(select) {
            const input = document.getElementById('otherPlotSize');
            if (select.value === 'Other') {
                input.classList.remove('hidden');
                input.required = true;
            } else {
                input.classList.add('hidden');
                input.required = false;
            }
        }

        // Other Quantity Toggle
        function toggleOtherQuantity(radio) {
            const input = document.getElementById('otherQuantity');
            if (radio.value === 'Other') {
                input.disabled = false;
                input.required = true;
                input.focus();
            } else {
                input.disabled = true;
                input.required = false;
                input.value = '';
            }
        }

        // Other NOK Relationship Toggle
        function toggleOtherNok(radio) {
            const input = document.getElementById('otherNokRelationship');
            if (radio.value === 'Other') {
                input.disabled = false;
                input.required = true;
                input.focus();
            } else {
                input.disabled = true;
                input.required = false;
                input.value = '';
            }
        }

        // --- CO-OWNER MODAL LOGIC ---
        function handleOwnershipChange(isLoad = false) {
            const val = document.getElementById('ownershipSelect').value;
            if (val === 'joint') {
                if (!isLoad) {
                    document.getElementById('coOwnerModal').classList.remove('hidden');
                }
            } else {
                // Clear hidden fields when sole is selected
                document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_name').value = "";
                document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_address').value = "";
                document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_occupation').value = "";
                document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_phone').value = "";
                document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_email').value = "";
            }
        }

        function closeCoOwnerModal() {
            document.getElementById('coOwnerModal').classList.add('hidden');
            // If they closed it without saving, and fields are empty, revert to sole
            if (!document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_name').value) {
                document.getElementById('ownershipSelect').value = 'sole';
            }
        }

        function saveCoOwner() {
            const fields = [
                { id: 'modal_co_owner_name', label: 'Full Name', required: true },
                { id: 'modal_co_owner_address', label: 'Residential Address', required: true },
                { id: 'modal_co_owner_occupation', label: 'Occupation', required: true },
                { id: 'modal_co_owner_phone', label: 'Phone Number', required: true },
                { id: 'modal_co_owner_email', label: 'Email Address', required: true },
            ];

            const missing = [];
            fields.forEach(f => {
                const el = document.getElementById(f.id);
                if (f.required && !el.value.trim()) {
                    missing.push(f.label);
                    el.classList.add('border-red-500', 'ring-1', 'ring-red-400');
                } else {
                    el.classList.remove('border-red-500', 'ring-1', 'ring-red-400');
                }
            });

            if (missing.length > 0) {
                const banner = document.getElementById('coOwnerErrorBanner');
                banner.innerHTML = `<div class="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle text-red-500 mt-0.5"></i>
                    <div>
                        <p class="font-bold text-red-700 text-sm mb-1">Please fill in the following required fields:</p>
                        <ul class="list-disc list-inside">${missing.map(m => `<li class="text-red-600 text-sm">${m}</li>`).join('')}</ul>
                    </div>
                </div>`;
                banner.classList.remove('hidden');
                return;
            }

            document.getElementById('coOwnerErrorBanner').classList.add('hidden');

            const name = document.getElementById('modal_co_owner_name').value.trim();
            const addr = document.getElementById('modal_co_owner_address').value.trim();
            const occ = document.getElementById('modal_co_owner_occupation').value.trim();
            const phone = document.getElementById('modal_co_owner_phone').value.trim();
            const email = document.getElementById('modal_co_owner_email').value.trim();

            // Save to hidden form fields
            document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_name').value = name;
            document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_address').value = addr;
            document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_occupation').value = occ;
            document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_phone').value = phone;
            document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_email').value = email;

            document.getElementById('coOwnerModal').classList.add('hidden');

            // Optional: Show a subtle confirmation
            const btn = document.querySelector('button[onclick="saveCoOwner()"]');
            const oldTxt = btn.innerHTML;
            btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Saved!';
            btn.classList.replace('bg-gold', 'bg-green-500');
            setTimeout(() => {
                btn.innerHTML = oldTxt;
                btn.classList.replace('bg-green-500', 'bg-gold');
            }, 2000);
        }

        // --- AUTO-SAVE LOGIC ---
        const AUTOSAVE_KEY = 'ecPropertyFormState';

        function saveFormState() {
            const state = {};
            const inputs = form.querySelectorAll('input, select, textarea');
            inputs.forEach(input => {
                if (input.type === 'file' || input.type === 'hidden') return; // Skip files and raw hidden vars
                if (input.type === 'radio' || input.type === 'checkbox') {
                    if (input.checked) state[input.name || input.id] = input.value;
                } else {
                    if (input.name) state[input.name] = input.value;
                    else if (input.id) state[input.id] = input.value;
                }
            });
            localStorage.setItem(AUTOSAVE_KEY, JSON.stringify(state));
        }

        function loadFormState() {
            const savedString = localStorage.getItem(AUTOSAVE_KEY);
            if (!savedString) return;
            try {
                const state = JSON.parse(savedString);
                const inputs = form.querySelectorAll('input, select, textarea');
                inputs.forEach(input => {
                    if (input.type === 'file' || input.type === 'hidden') return;

                    const val = state[input.name] !== undefined ? state[input.name] : state[input.id];
                    if (val !== undefined && val !== "") {
                        if (input.type === 'radio' || input.type === 'checkbox') {
                            if (input.value === val) input.checked = true;
                        } else {
                            input.value = val;
                        }
                    }
                });

                // Re-trigger visual UI toggles based on loaded state
                const propSelect = document.getElementById('propertySelect');
                if (propSelect) toggleOtherProperty(propSelect);

                const plotSelect = document.getElementById('plotSizeSelect');
                if (plotSelect) toggleOtherPlotSize(plotSelect);

                const qRadios = document.getElementsByName('quantity');
                qRadios.forEach(r => { if (r.checked) toggleOtherQuantity(r); });

                handleOwnershipChange(true); // Pass true to prevent modal popup on load
            } catch (e) {
                console.error("Autosave load failed", e);
            }
        }

        form.addEventListener('input', saveFormState);
        form.addEventListener('change', saveFormState);
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            loadFormState();
            updateSteps(); // Ensure wizard is in the right state on load
        });
        form.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            clearStepError();
            document.getElementById('globalErrorBanner')?.classList.add('hidden');

            const goldBtn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
            const originalText = goldBtn.innerHTML;

            // 1. Enter Locked Loading State Immediately
            goldBtn.disabled = true;
            goldBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin mr-2"></i> Processing Application...';

            try {
                // 2. Wait for background uploads (Max 5s silenty, then ask)
                if (typeof activeUploads !== 'undefined' && activeUploads > 0) {
                    console.log("Waiting for background uploads...", activeUploads);
                    goldBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin mr-2"></i> Finishing Document Uploads...';

                    let pollCount = 0;
                    while (activeUploads > 0 && pollCount < 10) { // 5 seconds (10 * 500ms)
                        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500));
                        pollCount++;
                    }

                    if (activeUploads > 0) {
                        const proceed = confirm("Some documents are still uploading. Do you want to submit with currently uploaded files anyway?");
                        if (!proceed) {
                            goldBtn.disabled = false;
                            goldBtn.innerHTML = originalText;
                            return;
                        }
                    }
                    // Restore processing text for finalize step
                    goldBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-circle-notch fa-spin mr-2"></i> Finalizing Application...';
                }

                // 3. Document Validation & Preparation
                const formData = new FormData(form);
                const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());

                // Co-Owner check
                if (data.ownership_type === 'joint' && !document.getElementById('hidden_co_owner_name').value) {
                    showStepError(["Co-Owner details (Joint ownership selected)"]);
                    currentStep = 5;
                    updateSteps();
                    throw new Error("Validation failed");
                }

                // Add UTMs and Attribution
                const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
                const utmKeys = ['utm_source', 'utm_medium', 'utm_campaign', 'utm_content', 'utm_term'];
                utmKeys.forEach(k => {
                    data[k] = urlParams.get(k) || localStorage.getItem(`ec_${k}`);
                });
                data.marketing_campaign_id = urlParams.get('mcid') || localStorage.getItem('mcid');

                // Handle Overrides
                if (data.property_name === 'Other') data.property_name = document.getElementById('otherPropertyName').value;
                if (data.plot_size === 'Other') data.plot_size = document.getElementById('otherPlotSize').value;
                if (data.quantity === 'Other') data.quantity = document.getElementById('otherQuantity').value;
                if (data.nok_relationship === 'Other') data.nok_relationship = document.getElementById('otherNokRelationship').value;

                // 4. Handle Signature
                if (typeof signaturePad !== 'undefined' && signaturePad && !signaturePad.isEmpty()) {
                    data.signature_data = signaturePad.toDataURL();
                } else {
                    showStepError(["Client Signature (Required)"]);
                    currentStep = 6;
                    updateSteps();
                    throw new Error("Validation failed");
                }

                // Check Consent
                if (!document.getElementById('consent').checked) {
                    showStepError(["Consent to terms (Required)"]);
                    throw new Error("Validation failed");
                }
                data.consent_given = true;

                // 4. API Submission
                const response = await fetch('/api/subscriptions/submit', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(data)
                });

                const result = await response.json();
                if (result.status === 'success') {
                    localStorage.removeItem(AUTOSAVE_KEY);
                    document.getElementById('successInvoiceNum').textContent = result.invoice_number;
                    document.getElementById('successModal').classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    throw new Error(result.message || "Unknown error occurred");
                }
            } catch (err) {
                if (err.message !== "Validation failed") {
                    console.error("Submission error:", err);
                    const banner = document.getElementById('globalErrorBanner');
                    const msg = document.getElementById('globalErrorMessage');
                    if (banner && msg) {
                        banner.classList.remove('hidden');
                        msg.textContent = "Oops! We encountered an issue. Please check your connection and try again.";
                        banner.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
                    }
                }
            } finally {
                goldBtn.disabled = false;
                goldBtn.innerHTML = originalText;
            }
        });
    </script>
</body>

</html>



================================================

    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="label">Occupation</label>
      <input type="text" id="occupation" class="input" placeholder="e.g. Entrepreneur, Civil Servant" required>
    </div>
    
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="label">Relationship to Parties</label>
      <select id="relationship_to_parties" class="input" required>
        <option value="">Select relationship</option>
        <option value="independent_witness">Independent Witness (recommended)</option>
        <option value="family_member">Family Member</option>
        <option value="friend">Friend</option>
        <option value="colleague">Colleague</option>
        <option value="other">Other</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    
    <label class="label">Signature</label>
    <div class="sig-tabs">
      <div class="sig-tab active" data-tab="draw">Draw Signature</div>
      <div class="sig-tab" data-tab="upload">Upload Photo</div>
    </div>
    
    <div id="draw-container" class="sig-container active">
      <canvas id="sig-pad"></canvas>
      <div class="sig-clear" id="clear-pad">Clear</div>
    </div>
    
    <div id="upload-container" class="sig-container">
      <label class="file-input-container" for="sig-file">
        <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:var(--gold);"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>
        <p>Click to take photo or upload image</p>
        <span id="file-name" style="display:block; margin-top:4px; font-weight:600; color:var(--gold);"></span>
      </label>
      <input type="file" id="sig-file" accept="image/*" capture="environment">
      <div class="preview-container" id="preview-box">
        <p style="font-size:11px; color:var(--gray); margin-bottom:4px;">Preview:</p>
        <img src="" id="sig-preview" class="preview-img">
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="form-group">
      <label style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer;">
        <input type="checkbox" id="acknowledgement" style="margin-top: 2px; flex-shrink: 0;">
        <span style="font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--dark2);">
          I have reviewed the Contract of Sale document above and acknowledge that I have read, understood, and agree to act as a witness to this transaction. This signature will also be used for the associated Deed of Assignment.
        </span>
      </label>
    </div>
    
    <button class="btn-submit" id="submit-btn" disabled>Submit Witness Signature</button>
    
    <p class="notice">
      By signing, you confirm that you have reviewed the client's Contract of Sale document and personally witnessed this execution. Your signature will also be applied to the associated Deed of Assignment document.
    </p>
    <p class="notice" style="font-size: 11px; margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.4;">
      <strong>Security Notice:</strong> For compliance and audit purposes, your IP address, device type, user agent, and signing time are recorded as part of the digital signature certificate for this transaction.
    </p>
  </div>
  
  <div class="card success-overlay" id="success-card">
    <div class="success-icon">âœ“</div>
    <h2 class="title">Successfully Signed</h2>
    <p class="subtitle">Thank you. Your witness signature has been securely recorded and will also be applied to the associated Deed of Assignment document.</p>
    <p style="margin-top:24px; font-size:13px; color:var(--gray);">You may now close this window.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // --- Initialization ---
  const token = window.location.pathname.split('/').pop();
  let signatureMethod = 'drawn';
  let signatureBase64 = null;
  let savedSignatureDataUrl = null;
  
  // Signature Pad
  const canvas = document.getElementById("sig-pad");
  const signaturePad = new SignaturePad(canvas, {
    backgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)',
    penColor: 'rgb(0, 0, 0)'
  });
  
  // Polyfill for canvas sizing
  function resizeCanvas() {
    const ratio = Math.max(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 1);
    if (!signaturePad.isEmpty()) {
      savedSignatureDataUrl = signaturePad.toDataURL("image/png");
    }

    canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth * ratio;
    canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight * ratio;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
    ctx.setTransform(ratio, 0, 0, ratio, 0, 0);
    signaturePad.clear();

    if (savedSignatureDataUrl) {
      signaturePad.fromDataURL(savedSignatureDataUrl);
    }
  }
  window.addEventListener("resize", resizeCanvas);
  resizeCanvas();

  // --- Data Loading ---
  async function loadContext() {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/signing/context/${token}`);
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.detail || "Invalid link");
      
      document.getElementById('estate-name').textContent = data.estate_name;
      document.getElementById('purchaser-name').textContent = data.client_name;
      document.getElementById('property-desc').textContent = `${data.estate_name} (${data.plot_size_sqm} SQM)`;
      document.getElementById('contract-date').textContent = data.contract_date;
    } catch (err) {
      document.getElementById('form-card').innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:center; padding:40px 0;">
        <p style="color:var(--red); font-weight:600;">Error: ${err.message}</p>
        <p style="font-size:13px; color:var(--gray); margin-top:12px;">This link may have expired or is invalid.</p>
      </div>`;
    }
  }
  loadContext();

  // --- View Contract Function ---
  function viewContract() {
    const previewUrl = `/api/signing/preview/${token}`;
    window.open(previewUrl, '_blank', 'width=900,height=800,scrollbars=yes,resizable=yes');
  }


  // --- Event Listeners ---
  
  // Tabs
  document.querySelectorAll('.sig-tab').forEach(tab => {
    tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
      document.querySelectorAll('.sig-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
      document.querySelectorAll('.sig-container').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
      
      tab.classList.add('active');
      const target = tab.getAttribute('data-tab');
      document.getElementById(`${target}-container`).classList.add('active');
      signatureMethod = target;
      
      if (target === 'draw') {
        resizeCanvas();
      }
      validateForm();
    });
  });
  
  // Clear Pad
  document.getElementById('clear-pad').addEventListener('click', () => {
    signaturePad.clear();
    validateForm();
  });
  
  // File Upload
  document.getElementById('sig-file').addEventListener('change', (e) => {
    const file = e.target.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    
    document.getElementById('file-name').textContent = file.name;
    
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = (ev) => {
      signatureBase64 = ev.target.result;
      document.getElementById('sig-preview').src = signatureBase64;
      document.getElementById('preview-box').style.display = 'block';
      validateForm();
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
  
  // Form Validation
  const inputs = ['full_name', 'email', 'phone_number', 'address', 'occupation', 'relationship_to_parties'];
  inputs.forEach(id => {
    document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('input', validateForm);
  });
  document.getElementById('relationship_to_parties').addEventListener('change', validateForm);
  document.getElementById('acknowledgement').addEventListener('change', validateForm);
  
  canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', validateForm);
  canvas.addEventListener('touchend', validateForm);

  // Email hint element (injected once)
  const emailInput = document.getElementById('email');
  let emailHint = document.getElementById('email-hint');
  if (!emailHint) {
    emailHint = document.createElement('p');
    emailHint.id = 'email-hint';
    emailHint.style.cssText = 'font-size:12px; color:#e53935; margin-top:4px; display:none;';
    emailHint.textContent = 'Please enter a valid email address (e.g. name@example.com)';
    emailInput.parentNode.appendChild(emailHint);
  }
  
  function isValidEmail(val) {
    return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(val.trim());
  }

  function validateForm() {
    const isFilled = inputs.every(id => document.getElementById(id).value.trim().length > 0);
    const emailVal = emailInput.value.trim();
    const isEmailValid = isValidEmail(emailVal);

    // Show/hide email hint only when user has typed something
    if (emailVal.length > 0 && !isEmailValid) {
      emailHint.style.display = 'block';
      emailInput.style.borderColor = '#e53935';
    } else {
      emailHint.style.display = 'none';
      emailInput.style.borderColor = '';
    }

    const isAcknowledged = document.getElementById('acknowledgement').checked;
    let hasSignature = false;
    
    if (signatureMethod === 'drawn') {
      hasSignature = !signaturePad.isEmpty();
      if (hasSignature) {
        signatureBase64 = signaturePad.toDataURL("image/png");
      }
    } else {
      hasSignature = !!signatureBase64;
    }
    
    document.getElementById('submit-btn').disabled = !(isFilled && isEmailValid && hasSignature && isAcknowledged);
  }
  
  // Submit
  document.getElementById('submit-btn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const btn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.textContent = "Submitting...";
    
    const payload = {
      witness_number: 1, // Will be handled by the backend logic or shared via link params
      full_name: document.getElementById('full_name').value.trim(),
        email: document.getElementById('email').value.trim(),
      phone_number: document.getElementById('phone_number').value.trim(),
      address: document.getElementById('address').value.trim(),
      occupation: document.getElementById('occupation').value.trim(),
      relationship_to_parties: document.getElementById('relationship_to_parties').value,
      signature_base64: signatureBase64,
      signature_method: signatureMethod,
      acknowledgement: document.getElementById('acknowledgement').checked
    };
    
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/signing/sign/${token}`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(payload)
      });
      
      const result = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) {
        // FastAPI validation errors return detail as an array of objects
        let errMsg = 'Submission failed';
        if (result.detail) {
          if (Array.isArray(result.detail)) {
            errMsg = result.detail.map(e => e.msg || JSON.stringify(e)).join('\n');
          } else {
            errMsg = String(result.detail);
          }
        }
        throw new Error(errMsg);
      }
      
      document.getElementById('form-card').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('success-card').style.display = 'block';
      window.scrollTo(0, 0);
    } catch (err) {
      alert(err.message);
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.textContent = "Submit Witness Signature";
    }
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
