<script>
  const token = window.location.pathname.split('/').pop();
  let signatureMethod = 'drawn';
  let signatureBase64 = null;
  let savedSignatureDataUrl = null;

  const canvas = document.getElementById('sig-pad');
  const signaturePad = new SignaturePad(canvas, {
    backgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)',
    penColor: 'rgb(0, 0, 0)'
  });

  function resizeCanvas() {
    const ratio = Math.max(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 1);
    if (!signaturePad.isEmpty()) {
      savedSignatureDataUrl = signaturePad.toDataURL('image/png');
    }
    canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth * ratio;
    canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight * ratio;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.setTransform(ratio, 0, 0, ratio, 0, 0);
    signaturePad.clear();
    if (savedSignatureDataUrl) {
      signaturePad.fromDataURL(savedSignatureDataUrl);
    }
  }
  window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);
  resizeCanvas();

  async function loadContext() {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/signing/client-context/${token}`);
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.detail || 'Invalid link');
      document.getElementById('client-name').textContent = data.client_name;
      document.getElementById('property-desc').textContent = `${data.estate_name} (${data.plot_size_sqm} SQM)`;
      document.getElementById('contract-date').textContent = data.contract_date;
    } catch (err) {
      document.getElementById('form-card').innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:center; padding:40px 0;"><p style="color:var(--red); font-weight:600;">Error: ${err.message}</p><p style="font-size:13px; color:var(--gray); margin-top:12px;">This link may have expired or is invalid.</p></div>`;
    }
  }
  loadContext();

  function viewContract() {
    const previewUrl = `/api/signing/preview/${token}`;
    window.open(previewUrl, '_blank', 'width=900,height=800,scrollbars=yes,resizable=yes');
  }


  document.querySelectorAll('.sig-tab').forEach(tab => {
    tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
      document.querySelectorAll('.sig-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
      document.querySelectorAll('.sig-container').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
      tab.classList.add('active');
      const target = tab.getAttribute('data-tab');
      document.getElementById(`${target}-container`).classList.add('active');
      signatureMethod = target;
      if (target === 'draw') resizeCanvas();
      validateForm();
    });
  });

  document.getElementById('clear-pad').addEventListener('click', () => {
    signaturePad.clear();
    validateForm();
  });

  document.getElementById('sig-file').addEventListener('change', (e) => {
    const file = e.target.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    document.getElementById('file-name').textContent = file.name;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = (ev) => {
      signatureBase64 = ev.target.result;
      document.getElementById('sig-preview').src = signatureBase64;
      document.getElementById('preview-box').style.display = 'block';
      validateForm();
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });

  document.getElementById('acknowledgement').addEventListener('change', validateForm);
  canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', validateForm);
  canvas.addEventListener('touchend', validateForm);

  function validateForm() {
    const hasSignature = signatureMethod === 'drawn' ? !signaturePad.isEmpty() : !!signatureBase64;
    if (hasSignature && signatureMethod === 'drawn') {
      signatureBase64 = signaturePad.toDataURL('image/png');
    }
    const isAcknowledged = document.getElementById('acknowledgement').checked;
    document.getElementById('submit-btn').disabled = !(hasSignature && isAcknowledged);
  }

  document.getElementById('submit-btn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const btn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.textContent = 'Submitting...';
    const payload = {
      signature_base64: signatureBase64,
      signature_method: signatureMethod,
      acknowledgement: document.getElementById('acknowledgement').checked
    };
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/signing/client/${token}`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(payload)
      });
      const result = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) {
        let errMsg = 'Submission failed';
        if (result.detail) {
          if (Array.isArray(result.detail)) {
            errMsg = result.detail.map(e => e.msg || JSON.stringify(e)).join('\n');
          } else {
            errMsg = String(result.detail);
          }
        }
        throw new Error(errMsg);
      }
      document.getElementById('form-card').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('success-card').style.display = 'block';
      window.scrollTo(0, 0);
    } catch (err) {
      alert(err.message);
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.textContent = 'Submit Contract Signature';
    }
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>My Legal Matters | Eximp & Cloves HR Portal</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F1115 0%, #1a1f2e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
        }
        .brand-gold { color: #C47D0A; }
        .bg-brand-gold { background-color: #C47D0A; }

            background: rgba(30, 33, 40, 0.8);
            border: 1px solid rgba(196, 125, 10, 0.2);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }
        .card:hover {
            border-color: #C47D0A;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(196, 125, 10, 0.15);
        }
        .status-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 4px 12px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;

        .status-review { background: rgba(255, 152, 0, 0.2); color: #FFB74D; }

        .status-executed { background: rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.2); color: #81C784; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-6 py-12">
        <!-- Header -->
        <div class="mb-12">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
                <img src="/static/img/logo_dark.svg" alt="Eximp & Cloves" style="height: 40px;">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold text-white">My Legal Matters</h1>
                    <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm mt-1">Personnel documents & agreements</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Loading State -->
        <div id="loading" class="text-center py-12">
            <div class="inline-block">
                <div class="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-brand-gold"></div>
                <p class="text-gray-400 mt-4">Loading your legal matters...</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Matters List -->
        <div id="matters-container" class="hidden space-y-4">
            <!-- Will be populated by JavaScript -->
        </div>

        <!-- Empty State -->
        <div id="empty-state" class="hidden text-center py-16">
            <div class="inline-block mb-4 text-6xl">ðŸ“‹</div>
            <h2 class="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">No Legal Matters Yet</h2>
            <p class="text-gray-400">You haven't been assigned any legal documents at this time.</p>
        </div>

        <!-- Error State -->
        <div id="error-state" class="hidden">
            <div class="card rounded-lg p-6 border-red-500/50 bg-red-500/10">
                <p class="text-red-400">âš  Error loading legal matters. Please try again.</p>
                <button onclick="loadMatters()" class="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-brand-gold text-white rounded font-bold text-sm hover:bg-yellow-600 transition">
                    Retry
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const API_BASE = '/api/hr-legal';

        async function loadMatters() {
            const loadingEl = document.getElementById('loading');
            const containerEl = document.getElementById('matters-container');
            const emptyEl = document.getElementById('empty-state');
            const errorEl = document.getElementById('error-state');

            loadingEl.classList.remove('hidden');
            containerEl.classList.add('hidden');
            emptyEl.classList.add('hidden');
            errorEl.classList.add('hidden');

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/staff/self/visible-matters`, {
                    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('ec_token')}` }
                });

                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load matters');
                const data = await res.json();

                loadingEl.classList.add('hidden');

                if (!data.matters || data.matters.length === 0) {
                    emptyEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                    return;
                }

                containerEl.innerHTML = data.matters.map(matter => `
                    <div class="card rounded-lg p-6 transition cursor-pointer hover:shadow-lg" onclick="viewMatter('${matter.id}')">
                        <div class="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                            <div>
                                <h3 class="text-white font-bold text-lg">${escapeHtml(matter.title)}</h3>
                                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">${escapeHtml(matter.category)}</p>
                            </div>
                            <span class="status-badge status-${matter.status.toLowerCase().replace(' ', '-')}">
                                ${matter.status}
                            </span>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-gray-400 text-xs mb-4">
                            ðŸ“… ${new Date(matter.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-NG')}
                        </p>
                        <div class="flex gap-2">
                            <button onclick="event.stopPropagation(); viewMatter('${matter.id}')" class="flex-1 px-4 py-2 bg-brand-gold text-white rounded font-bold text-sm hover:bg-yellow-600 transition">
                                ðŸ“„ View Document
                            </button>
                            ${matter.requires_signing ? `
                                <button onclick="event.stopPropagation(); acknowledgeMatter('${matter.id}')" class="flex-1 px-4 py-2 bg-green-600 text-white rounded font-bold text-sm hover:bg-green-700 transition">
                                    âœ“ Sign / Acknowledge
                                </button>
                            ` : ''}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `).join('');

                containerEl.classList.remove('hidden');
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Error loading matters:', err);
                loadingEl.classList.add('hidden');
                errorEl.classList.remove('hidden');
            }
        }

        function escapeHtml(text) {
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.textContent = text;
            return div.innerHTML;
        }

        function viewMatter(matterId) {
            // Open matter in a modal or new tab
            window.open(`/legal/view?id=${matterId}`, '_blank');
        }

        function acknowledgeMatter(matterId) {
            // Redirect to signing page
            window.location.href = `/legal/sign?matter_id=${matterId}`;
        }

        // Load on page load
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', loadMatters);
    </script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">

    <title>Support Portal | Eximp & Cloves</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <style>
        * { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
        body {
            background: #0F0F0F;
            color: #F9FAFB;
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .portal-card {
            background: rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border-radius: 24px;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 800px;
            box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;

            height: min(90vh, 800px);
        }
        .header {
            padding: 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }
        .logo {
            color: #C47D0A;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            font-size: 14px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        .ticket-title {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: white;
        }
        .status-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-top: 12px;
        }
        .status-open { background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1); color: #10B981; }
        .status-pending { background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.1); color: #F59E0B; }
        .status-resolved { background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1); color: #3B82F6; }

        .chat-area {
            flex: 1;

<body>
    <div class="portal-card">
        <div class="header">
            <div class="logo">Eximp & Cloves Support</div>
            <h1 class="ticket-title" id="ticketSubject">Loading ticket...</h1>
            <div id="ticketStatus" class="status-badge">Processing</div>
        </div>

        <div class="chat-area" id="chatThread">
            <!-- Messages go here -->
        </div>
        <div id="typing-indicator" class="px-8 pb-2">Admin is typing<span class="typing-dots"></span></div>

        <div class="input-area" id="replyFormContainer">
            <textarea id="replyText" class="text-input" rows="3" placeholder="Type your reply here..."></textarea>
            <button id="sendBtn" class="btn-send" onclick="sendReply()">
                <i class="fas fa-paper-plane mr-2"></i> Send Reply
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const ticketId = "{{ ticket_id }}";
        let socket = null;
        let typingTimeout = null;
        
        async function loadTicket() {
            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/support/portal/${ticketId}`);
                if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Ticket not found");
                const data = await res.json();
                
                document.getElementById("ticketSubject").textContent = data.subject;
                
                const statusBadge = document.getElementById("ticketStatus");
                statusBadge.textContent = data.status;
                statusBadge.className = `status-badge status-${data.status}`;

                const thread = document.getElementById("chatThread");
                let html = `
                    <div class="msg-bubble msg-agent">
                        <div class="msg-info">Initial Description â€¢ ${new Date(data.created_at).toLocaleString()}</div>
                        ${data.description}
                    </div>
                `;

                data.ticket_responses.forEach(r => {
                    const isAgent = r.admin_id !== null;
                    html += `
                        <div class="msg-bubble ${isAgent ? 'msg-agent' : 'msg-client'}">
                            <div class="msg-info">${isAgent ? (r.admins?.full_name || 'Support Agent') : 'You'} â€¢ ${new Date(r.created_at).toLocaleString()}</div>
                            ${r.message}
                        </div>
                    `;
                });

                thread.innerHTML = html;
                thread.scrollTop = thread.scrollHeight;

                if (data.status === 'resolved' || data.status === 'closed') {
                    document.getElementById("replyFormContainer").innerHTML = `
                        <div class="text-center p-4 text-gray-500 text-sm">
                            This ticket has been marked as <strong>${data.status}</strong>. If you still need help, please open a new ticket.
                        </div>
                    `;
                }

            } catch (err) {
                document.querySelector(".portal-card").innerHTML = `
                    <div class="p-20 text-center">
                        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle text-4xl text-red-500 mb-4"></i>
                        <h2 class="text-xl font-bold">Ticket Not Found</h2>
                        <p class="text-gray-400 mt-2">The link may be invalid or the ticket has been removed.</p>
                    </div>
                `;
            }
        }

        // --- WEBSOCKET LOGIC ---
        function initWebSocket() {
            const protocol = window.location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:';
            socket = new WebSocket(`${protocol}//${window.location.host}/api/ws/support/${ticketId}`);
            
            socket.onmessage = (event) => {
                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
                if (data.type === 'message') {
                    loadTicket(); // Refresh thread
                } else if (data.type === 'typing') {
                    const indicator = document.getElementById("typing-indicator");
                    indicator.style.display = data.is_typing ? 'block' : 'none';
                    
                    // Auto-hide after 5s if we don't get a stop signal
                    if (data.is_typing) {
                        clearTimeout(window.agentTypingTimer);
                        window.agentTypingTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                            indicator.style.display = 'none';
                        }, 5000);
                    }
                }
            };

            socket.onclose = () => {
                console.log("WS closed, reconnecting...");
                setTimeout(initWebSocket, 3000);
            };
        }

        function sendTypingSignal(isTyping) {
            if (socket && socket.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
                socket.send(JSON.stringify({
                    type: 'typing',
                    is_typing: isTyping,
                    is_admin: false
                }));
            }
        }

        document.getElementById("replyText").addEventListener("input", () => {
            sendTypingSignal(true);
            clearTimeout(typingTimeout);
            typingTimeout = setTimeout(() => sendTypingSignal(false), 3000);
            
            // Also notify backend for fallback
            fetch(`/api/support/tickets/${ticketId}/typing?is_typing=true&is_admin=false`, { method: 'POST' });
        });

        async function sendReply() {
            const msg = document.getElementById("replyText").value.trim();
            if (!msg) return;

            const btn = document.getElementById("sendBtn");
            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Sending...';

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/api/support/tickets/${ticketId}/client-reply`, {
                    method: "POST",
                    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ 
                        ticket_id: ticketId,
                        message: msg 
                    })
                });

                if (res.ok) {
                    document.getElementById("replyText").value = "";
                    sendTypingSignal(false);
                    
                    // Send WebSocket message signal
                    if (socket && socket.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
                        socket.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'message' }));
                    }
                    
                    loadTicket();
                }
            } catch (err) {
                alert("Failed to send reply. Please try again.");
            } finally {
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-paper-plane mr-2"></i> Send Reply';
            }
        }

        loadTicket();
        initWebSocket();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

        body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background: #f9fafb; color: #1f2937; margin: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; padding: 20px; }

FILE: tmp/check_client.py
================================================
import os
import sys
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from supabase import create_client, Client

load_dotenv()
url = os.getenv("SUPABASE_URL")
key = os.getenv("SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY")
supabase = create_client(url, key)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("Analyzing client address data...")
    res = supabase.table("clients").select("address, city, state").execute()
    data = res.data
    
    total = len(data)
    yaba_lagos_with_address = 0
    yaba_lagos_no_address = 0
    others = 0
    
    for c in data:
        addr = (c.get("address") or "").lower().strip()
        city = (c.get("city") or "").lower().strip()
        state = (c.get("state") or "").lower().strip()
        
        has_addr = bool(addr)
        is_yaba_lagos = (city == "yaba" or state == "lagos")
        
        if is_yaba_lagos:
            if has_addr:
                yaba_lagos_with_address += 1
                print(f"SUSPICIOUS: Addr='{c['address']}', City='{c['city']}', State='{c['state']}'")
            else:
                yaba_lagos_no_address += 1
        else:
            others += 1
            
    print(f"\nSummary:")
    print(f"Total Clients: {total}")
    print(f"Yaba or Lagos (with other address): {yaba_lagos_with_address}")
    print(f"Yaba or Lagos (NO other address): {yaba_lagos_no_address}")
    print(f"Other / Genuine: {others}")
